programme.title: Howie Mandel's 5th Annual All-Star Comedy Gala
programme.desc: Howie Mandel returns to the iconic Just For Laughs stage to host his yearly stand-up comedy gala in this special that can’t be missed.

programme.title: Just for Laughs Presents: Sophie Buddle: Smile Baby
programme.desc: Sophie Buddle hits the stage in Montreal for one night of laugh-out-loud stand-up comedy in this half-hour special from Just For Laughs.

programme.title: Anthony Jeselnik LIVE @JFL
programme.desc: Anthony Jeselnik hosts some of the world’s best comedians in this Just For Laughs stand-up special.

programme.title: Forest Fires
programme.desc: Hosts Steve Hamilton and Kaylee Klassen chat with John Davies and Byron Wolf about the ongoing fires across the country.

programme.title: Missouri Cats, Coyotes and Coon
programme.desc: Join Matt Burson and his son Ethan as they pursue their passion of land trapping a mixed bag of critters in the state of Missouri. These two men are skilled, and theyll share their techniques with you today as the fur starts to pile up.

programme.title: Gators with a Twist
programme.desc: We kick off the show with Blaine’s opinion on people critiquing other people’s deer on social media. Then we head off to Florida where Blaine finds almost 10,000 new acres to look for gators.

programme.title: Pork, It’s What’s for Supper
programme.desc: Blaine is still in Florida and is looking to add pork to the menu. We also go behind the scenes on a different show and show you the hunt, then how it REALLY went down.

programme.title: Alaskan Salmon Run
programme.desc: Larysa Switlyk ventures off to Alaska to fill her freezer with salmon and shares her passion of fishing with Mark who was there to help film but later couldn’t take the fly rod out of his hand!

programme.title: Season 3, Episode 7
programme.desc: We’ve got a C21 update with Tracey Wilson, as well as some of the craziest clips we’ve had on the show ever!

programme.title: Extremely Unleashed in Texas
programme.desc: Larysa Switlyk hunts free range aoudad in west Texas which ends up being more of a challenge than she expected. Then she takes a group of friends on a hog control mission out of a helicopter!

programme.title: Patriot Warrior Whitetail Hunt
programme.desc: Hank Parker goes whitetail hunting with the Patriot Warrior Foundation

programme.title: 100 Degree Honkers
programme.desc: Honkers", "shortDescription": "Brad guides Claudio and 3 clients to 200 snow geese on one of the best hunts he has ever been on. Jason then guides Claudio and 5 clients to 27 big Canada geese and 3 specs on a hot afternoon in early September.

programme.title: Bigfoot and the Psychic
programme.desc: Ryan Willis, Joel Porter and the team meet up with psychic medium Jen Abra to investigate paranormal energy in a haunted forest

programme.title: Spruce Tree Root as Rope
programme.desc: Some Native Americans used the root of spruce trees as rope. Tune in to see Ryan Marshall demonstrate the technique.

programme.title: The Importance of Tripods
programme.desc: The tripod is the most important structure to learn, as it serves many purposes. Learn how to build one with Ryan Marshall

programme.title: Cattails: The Supermarket of the Swamp
programme.desc: All of the cattail is edible, at any time of the year there is at least one part that can be eaten. Watch to learn how and when to prepare cattails

programme.title: Big Tracks & Heavy Racks 2023
programme.desc: Weve decided to wrap up fall with our fan-favourite, 90-minute marathon, Big Tracks & Heavy Racks. This year's elk and moose hunt compilation brings you some mega giants, courtesy of The EDGE, Line of Sight TV, Bushnell Presents Prairie Pursuit, and more popular series.

programme.title: The Perfect Hunt
programme.desc: On this hunt Daryl guides 5 clients and Claudio to 48 ducks and 48 geese to wrap up the perfect trip!

programme.title: The Long Game - Part 2
programme.desc: Last season in Part 1, Rochelle Partridge passed up a monster framed 8, rolling the dice in hopes that the buck could survive another year. This episode shows just what a year can do.

programme.title: The Long Game - Part 3
programme.desc: The conclusion to Rochelle's unbelievable years long hunt, and the massive reward that can come when rolling the dice.

programme.title: The Maybe Buck
programme.desc: Taylor Partridge's Excalibur crossbow hunt for a MONSTER typical whitetail. A summer's work leads to a decision on whether or not to hunt a deer that turns out to be one of the largest in Canadian Whitetail history.

programme.title: These Colours Run Deep
programme.desc: This week Marc and Bill head out to meet up with some of the guys to go after some geese.

programme.title: Fun

programme.title: Property Diversity

programme.title: Bed Bucks

programme.title: Jason's Place
programme.desc: DDH Properties real estate expert Jason Rieckmann walks us through his own dream deer hunting property and shows us how easy it is to set up a brand new Orion hunting blind.

programme.desc: Part two of our Modern Heroes special, features the Rhinelander, Wisconsin volunteer fire department as they answer a call to save a fallen hunter.

programme.title: Pike & Smallmouth Bass
programme.desc: Casting lures for weed & structure pike and smallmouth bass.

programme.title: Season's Highlights

programme.desc: The captains take a deep look at flats fishing in Panama City, Florida.

programme.title: Sooner" Or Later"
programme.desc: We're headed out to Oklahoma to follow along with the Sharp brothers as they hunt whitetails in their home state. You never know what to expect with these two but one thing you can always rely on is that they always have some big deer to go after!

programme.title: Creative
programme.desc: Michael moves to Iowa and it is his first fall hunting Iowa as a resident. After scouting public ground all summer and early fall, things come together for him in November on an awesome hunt over a decoy

programme.title: Tradition
programme.desc: Josh heads to Camp Dinkota in North Dakota to kick off the late season push and arrows an awesome whitetail. Then Dylan joins Josh in deer camp and only a day later after Josh kills a good buck, Dylan has an opportunity at another great whitetail

programme.title: Commotion
programme.desc: Brennen heads to Kansas after a couple of years of not drawing a tag. After a bunch of scouting on public land and a few non productive sits, it all comes together during a classic rut hunt over a decoy in late November

programme.title: Beauchene Bass Bash
programme.desc: Taylor and Brittany target smallmouth bass in Northwestern Quebec, while exploring the waters of Beauchene Wilderness Lodge

programme.title: Mulies in the Snow
programme.desc: Taylor is Alberta bound in search of mule deer

programme.title: Shiras Moose: The Ghost of Southern Alberta
programme.desc: Steve's pursuit of the elusive Shiras Moose, known as the \"Ghost of Southern Alberta,\" is a culmination of his 12-year quest to complete his North American 29 collection. With dedication and passion, he ventures into the vast wilderness, determined to capture this elusive species on camera

programme.title: BC Borderland Bulls
programme.desc: Embark on BC's wilds with hunters Joe Eppele & Steven Dahn. Tracking majestic elk, witness challenges, camaraderie, & nature's beauty unfold. Join the camaraderie, witness the primal connection with nature, and live the hunt like never before

programme.title: A Decade of Dominance with Steve Ecklund
programme.desc: Celebrate a decade of wilderness exploration with Steve Ecklund, as he marks ten thrilling years of capturing his hunting adventures on film. From rugged landscapes to awe-inspiring encounters, join him in reliving the exhilarating journey of a true outdoorsman

programme.title: Trav’s First BC Black Bear
programme.desc: Travis \"The Timberwolf\", is in BC on a spot and stalk archery black bear hunt. After looking over a ton of bears this season, he has his heart set on taking his first BC black bear with his bow. Being as stealthy as possible Trav and Cheese are able to sneak into 15 yards of the bear and make a great shot. Trav then heads to the kitchen to make a delicious bear ham with the entire hind quarter

programme.title: Late Season Horseback Bulls - Part 1
programme.desc: Join Mitch and Lynn as they head out by horseback on a high country elk hunt after some late season bulls for their 2nd wedding anniversary. The air is thin and cold but the action is hot and heavy. The horses are saddled and the excitement is high as the romantic couple find bulls on almost every ridge top

programme.title: Late Season Horseback Bulls - Part 2
programme.desc: Continuing with their anniversary hunt, Mitch and Lynn are in the high country on an elk hunt in search of late season horseback bulls. With some hunting pressure in the area from other hunters, they move to a new location and find multiple bulls in a high country saddle. With lots of daylight left they wait them out and put a great bull on the ground!

programme.title: Drum Roll
programme.desc: Sandy beaches and driftwood make the perfect spot for wading out into the shallows to kick off spring fishing for freshwater drum. Josh is accompanied by newcomer Joe, and teaches him to navigate the lake in hip waders. In an area ripe with cattails, Josh shows Joe how to harvest and pickle these unsuspected treats

programme.title: Wild Turkey Confit
programme.desc: Surrounded by endless oaks on the edge of a ranch, Josh sets out to find a spring turkey, the key ingredient in a delicious riverside supper hes planning to make. He is accompanied by Chad, a local archery hunter whos there to help in the hunt and partake in the dinner

programme.title: The Stone Oven
programme.desc: In British Columbia, there is a legend of an ancient stone oven that was built in the mountains during construction of the railroad. Josh sets out on a trip to reconnect with his brothers, do some fishing, explore and ultimately search for this 100-year-old oven if he has come all this way, a meal is in order

programme.desc: Women Best Canada

programme.desc: Sanibel Goliath Grouper

programme.title: A Decade of Dominance with Steve Ecklund
programme.desc: Celebrate a decade of wilderness exploration with Steve Ecklund, as he marks ten thrilling years of capturing his hunting adventures on film. From rugged landscapes to awe-inspiring encounters, join him in reliving the exhilarating journey of a true outdoorsman

programme.title: Trav’s First BC Black Bear
programme.desc: Travis \"The Timberwolf\", is in BC on a spot and stalk archery black bear hunt. After looking over a ton of bears this season, he has his heart set on taking his first BC black bear with his bow. Being as stealthy as possible Trav and Cheese are able to sneak into 15 yards of the bear and make a great shot. Trav then heads to the kitchen to make a delicious bear ham with the entire hind quarter

programme.title: Late Season Horseback Bulls - Part 1
programme.desc: Join Mitch and Lynn as they head out by horseback on a high country elk hunt after some late season bulls for their 2nd wedding anniversary. The air is thin and cold but the action is hot and heavy. The horses are saddled and the excitement is high as the romantic couple find bulls on almost every ridge top

programme.title: Late Season Horseback Bulls - Part 2
programme.desc: Continuing with their anniversary hunt, Mitch and Lynn are in the high country on an elk hunt in search of late season horseback bulls. With some hunting pressure in the area from other hunters, they move to a new location and find multiple bulls in a high country saddle. With lots of daylight left they wait them out and put a great bull on the ground!

programme.title: Drum Roll
programme.desc: Sandy beaches and driftwood make the perfect spot for wading out into the shallows to kick off spring fishing for freshwater drum. Josh is accompanied by newcomer Joe, and teaches him to navigate the lake in hip waders. In an area ripe with cattails, Josh shows Joe how to harvest and pickle these unsuspected treats

programme.title: Wild Turkey Confit
programme.desc: Surrounded by endless oaks on the edge of a ranch, Josh sets out to find a spring turkey, the key ingredient in a delicious riverside supper hes planning to make. He is accompanied by Chad, a local archery hunter whos there to help in the hunt and partake in the dinner

programme.title: The Stone Oven
programme.desc: In British Columbia, there is a legend of an ancient stone oven that was built in the mountains during construction of the railroad. Josh sets out on a trip to reconnect with his brothers, do some fishing, explore and ultimately search for this 100-year-old oven if he has come all this way, a meal is in order

programme.title: Women Best Canada
programme.desc: Women Best Canada

programme.title: NHL Best Canada
programme.desc: NHL Best Canada

programme.title: Andy Bean in Southwest Florida
programme.desc: Andy Bean in Southwest Florida

programme.title: Sanibel Goliath Grouper
programme.desc: Sanibel Goliath Grouper

programme.title: Top Celebrity Fish Catches!
programme.desc: Over his 34 years on TV, Henry Waszczuk has had more than 100 celebrity guests on camera & theyve landed some pretty nice fish. This special will keep you at the edge of your seat with some great catches, featuring Henrys top celebrity guests

programme.title: Redfish, Snook & Pompano Too!
programme.desc: Pompano are known as one of the finest tasting saltwater fish. They are feisty and fight hard for their size. Henry Waszczuk heads to the quaint fishing village of Cortez to tangle with these tasty fish

programme.title: Nonacho Lake Fishing Adventures
programme.desc: Wes books a self-guided fishing trip north of the 60th parallel and does battle with the monster lake trout swimming within the depths of the 8th largest lake in the NWT

programme.title: Year-End Episode
programme.desc: Wes gives us a look at some of the highlights & unseen footage from the year

programme.title: Spot & Stalk Bow Fishing for Carp
programme.desc: Wes combines archery and fishing and takes on shallow-water carp in southern Saskatchewan

programme.title: Pend Oreille Waterfowl
programme.desc: The Pend Oreille River in northeast Washington is a waterfowl magnet and provided a perfect setting for close friends to enjoy time together in the blind. The ducks and geese keep the guys engaged between stories of days gone by

programme.title: Kettle Falls Walleye
programme.desc: Bob Loomis and Britton Ransford join Rich Harrod on a walleye fishing adventure to the upper reach of Lake Roosevelt. The fish are numerous and the bite is on in this beautiful part of the Columbia River

programme.title: Passing on a Hunting Traditon
programme.desc: The Martin fathers are teaching their daughters and sons to hunt elk in the juniper country of eastern Oregon. Horses helped the family get to the high ground where elusive bulls could be found, but the ride doesn’t guarantee success

programme.title: Gobble Gobble
programme.desc: This week on Hit Squad Outdoors, it's all about the turkeys

programme.title: The Hunt
programme.desc: Join five time UFC Champ, Tim Sylvia, in the outdoors hunting and fishing

programme.title: Dangerous Gator
programme.desc: Blaine is in a small dingy and things get a little crazy when a gator tries to get him inside the small boat

programme.title: The Show

programme.title: The Icebox
programme.desc: Northern Manitoba holds some of the biggest lake trout on the planet. Guides from Bakers Narrows Lodge explain the benefits of catch and release while battling extreme weather warnings on their way to becoming Master Anglers

programme.title: The Gateway
programme.desc: The Gateway is fed by ancient glacier rivers with an abundance of sockeye salmon and the predators that feed on them. Eric Orton talks about his time off-shore fishing Port Hardy

programme.title: It’s Like Candy for Pike
programme.desc: Today’s destination is Cree Lake in Northern Saskatchewan. When the bite slows, how do you entice the giants? Check out this finesse presentation that always works time and time again on the inactive brutes

programme.title: A Trick or Two for Bass
programme.desc: Today’s destination takes Charlie up to the Land O’ Lakes area of Eastern Ontario for smallmouth bass. Charlie joins up with friend Chris McMillan as the two enjoy a day of bass fishing. The two share techniques for clear water lakes

programme.title: Hooked on Lake Trout and Untouched Walleye
programme.desc: Today’s destination is Cree Lake in Northern Saskatchewan. Check out Charlie’s tip on modifying your tackle for large lake trout. Then, off for an often ignored walleye bite that will have you wanting more

programme.title: Hunting Mule Deer - Part 1
programme.desc: Watch this week as Ted, Amber and country music singer Heath Sanders go to hunt mule deer in Texas

programme.title: Hunting Mule Deer - Part 2
programme.desc: Ted and country music singer, Heath Sanders chase mule deer and then it’s off to do some airgun hunting on some Texas deer!

programme.desc: The boys take to the trails in Revelstoke, BC with members of the Revelstoke ATV Club

programme.title: White Lake BC Trout
programme.desc: Back to BC, on the beautiful waters of White Lake looking for trophy rainbows

programme.title: Kokanee Springs Escape

programme.title: YouTube Hog Hunt Special

programme.title: Swamp Hogs & Mickey Gilley Dedication

programme.title: Thermal Rampage
programme.desc: Keith Warren and his daughter meet up with Team Swamp Stomp for a Texas hog hunt in the dead of night using some killer Pulsar thermal scopes! Joining them is Garrett Streitz of APF, who decks out the team with some top-notch .308 Caliber AR-10s for the carnage!

programme.title: Dacre Part II & Mud Fest
programme.desc: Find out how the team finished at the Dacre and then they head to Mirimachi Mud Fest 2023

programme.title: Nackawic & Crabbe Mountain Inn

Many towns could learn from the welcoming nature of this town. We then head to an ATV friendly Inn to further explore the area

programme.title: Adventure Day
programme.desc: The Trekkit Crew takes a bunch of first time ATV riders out on brand new Segway ATVs and SxS and have them experience riding the trails. The trip ranges from getting stuck in the mud, rock climbs, and scenic trails

programme.title: Fur Buying Event

programme.title: Punching Trails

programme.title: African Adventure

programme.title: Rob Evans Memorial Bear Hunt - Part 1
programme.desc: Hosts Gary Bartels and Steve Holden take OATH heroes Master Sergeant Gilberto Tony Roman and Marine veteran Dave Kochmanski to Canada to hunt black bears with Harvest Lodge Outfitters for the inaugural Rob Evans Memorial Bear Hunt.

programme.title: Two Great Hog Hunts
programme.desc: fter participating in the Carolina Coyote Classic, John MacPherson is joined by Sean Casey of DNA Firearm systems to go hog hunting. Later he is joined by Adam Simpson for another incredible hog hunt!

programme.title: Hog & Coyote Hunting
programme.desc: John and Sean Casey help out a farmer who is having a problem with wild hogs, then it's coyote time!

programme.title: Arctic Char: Tree River Staycation - Part 2

programme.desc: The Cartwrights are in a battle over the validity of a Spanish land grant. They plan to stop the De La Cuesta family from seizing part of the Ponderosa along with all of the Carson Valley settlers' homestead lands.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While hunting, Lucas misses an easy shot at a cougar just a few feet away, and seconds from attacking Mark. After discovering that his gun is not the problem, Lucas begins to doubt his abilities with a rifle, leading him to do some soul-searching.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Railroad boss John Gangling runs an operation at Line Shack Six. Gangling pays his men in gold and when he finds that Charlie Been saves his wages in a money belt, he kills him for it. An innocent Indian who happens to stop by is accused of murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find Winslow Quince stranded in the desert with a broken wagon wheel. They stop to help, and when they get to North Fork with Quince, many note his gold coin purchases and lavish gifts. Lucas is suspicious, and townsfolk want answers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Maule comes to North Fork with revenge on his mind and confronts Lucas, who shot and killed his father years ago during a bank robbery. When Gridley tries to get Mark to fight, Micah puts him in jail, and Lou steps in to reform the young boy.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: Cody's rodeo is fast approaching and time is running out, so the cowboys head out to scout talent for the team-roping event. Misty's new barrel-racing horse has taken her training to a whole new level. So when Booger starts teasing her, she challenges him to a one-on-one race: cowboy vs barrel racer! Misty also comes up with a potential rodeo venue, so Cody heads out to Bay Minette, AL to lock down a site. Bubba and Kaley prepare for houseguest Andrew's family to arrive. Will Andrew finally find his own place, and get out of Kaley's hair? Meanwhile, the guys' reputation as cattle brokers starts to flourish. Booger gets a lead on a healthy herd of cattle in Texas, and the guys consider if they should go all-in and buy the entire herd. Booger heads back to the Lone Star State and strikes a deal that seems to be a win-win. But just as the guys get the ball rolling with another big deal, a phone call from their buyer puts everything in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The cowboys step a little outside of their comfort zones. Looking to offload their new herd, the guys head down to the local stockyard to hone their bartering skills. Cody bounces a crazy rodeo idea off the boys - then uses them guinea pigs. Bubba plans a short getaway with Kaley, but there's a big catch: Booger's been tapped as the babysitter, with Jaclyn lending a helping hand. Kaley wonders if Booger is up to the challenge. His first attempts to feed and dress little Andie suggest he most certainly is not! While Bubba and Kaley aren't sure they'll return home to find everything in one piece, they do get some great news from houseguest Andrew. Cody is desperate to find the final missing piece for his rodeo: an announcer. While Booger adamant that he's the perfect man for the job, Cody has to resort to using reverse psychology on his old friend to avoid disaster.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A troubled 18-year-old named Johnny Clover ransacks the North Fork Schoolhouse, stealing art supplies. Lucas later tries to help Johnny, but he lives with a controlling uncle who proves to be difficult to deal with.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A neighboring rancher's son is seriously injured in an accident. With the young man's condition getting worse, Lucas learns the rancher won't take his son to the doctor since he feels his wife died from poor treatment.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: A ten-year-old runaway named Joey Walker shows up at Fort Courage determined to enlist with the F Troop. O'Rourke tries to discourage the young boy by showing him that life there isn't glamorous. Meanwhile, tensions rise when Joey's mother arrives.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: A 147-year-old Hekawi Indian chief named Flaming Arrow attempts to win back the land from the United States Government starting with Fort Courage. He begins his attack by taking over the fort and trying to starve the F Troop until they surrender.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Charlie Russell is an aimless cowhand who loves the freedom of the cowboy way of life, and he is a self-taught artist who enjoys capturing the scenes of his rugged work on the range. Too embarrassed to ask people to pay for his paintings, he gives most of them away to friends or trades them for drinks at the saloon. But that changes quickly after he falls in love. Charlie's new bride Nancy gives him the encouragement he needs to stop cowboying in order to focus on his artwork. Under her watchful eye, he sobers up, stops cowboying, and improves his mastery of painting. Nancy is so proud of Charlie's talent that she doesn't hesitate to ask top dollar for his paintings. Years later, when legendary gunfighter-turned-newspaperman Bat Masterson tries to do a piece on Charlie, he quickly realizes that he must first deal with the woman behind the famous cowboy artist Charles M. Russell.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: When Black cowboy Nat Love overnights in Deadwood during a cattle drive, he decides to enter a Fourth of July cowboy competition. Confident in his roping, riding, and shooting skills, he is eager to test his mettle against the best cowboys around.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Although from humble beginnings, Tom Fitzpatrick is ambitious and intelligent. When he joins up with William Ashley's trapping expedition, he proves himself to be an invaluable member of the company, both as a hardy frontiersman and a shrewd businessman. Along with legendary mountain man Jedediah Smith, Fitzpatrick rediscovers the South Pass through the Rocky Mountains, opening the pathway that will enable western expansion for decades to come. Fitzpatrick quickly rises to the top of the fur trade and eventually takes over the company he once worked for, but he nearly loses everything when he takes a wrong turn while leading a supply train. Alone in the wilderness, he finds himself in a deadly game of cat-and-mouse with a band of Gros Ventre warriors. Somehow, Fitzpatrick must survive the harrowing trek back to safety without a horse, gun, or supplies.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: After the destruction of a Pony Express station in Rock Creek, Teaspoon, The Kid, and Jimmy receive an assignment to rebuild it. They must relocate and learn the new territory near town as well as the neighbors in the area.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne fulfills a dying war hero's wish and helps his son enlist in the Army. Cheyenne arrives at Fort Sumner with Jed Wayne, but trouble soon arises from a demanding colonel and the Comanche Indians' imminent uprising.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne meets gunslinger Matt Reardon, who rescues him from a fight. Reardon asks for Cheyenne's help as he plans to aid the widow of a man he accidentally killed. However, the dead man's son as other plans for Reardon.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Cartwrights are in a battle over the validity of a Spanish land grant. They plan to stop the De La Cuesta family from seizing part of the Ponderosa along with all of the Carson Valley settlers' homestead lands.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While hunting, Lucas misses an easy shot at a cougar just a few feet away, and seconds from attacking Mark. After discovering that his gun is not the problem, Lucas begins to doubt his abilities with a rifle, leading him to do some soul-searching.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Railroad boss John Gangling runs an operation at Line Shack Six. Gangling pays his men in gold and when he finds that Charlie Been saves his wages in a money belt, he kills him for it. An innocent Indian who happens to stop by is accused of murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find Winslow Quince stranded in the desert with a broken wagon wheel. They stop to help, and when they get to North Fork with Quince, many note his gold coin purchases and lavish gifts. Lucas is suspicious, and townsfolk want answers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Maule comes to North Fork with revenge on his mind and confronts Lucas, who shot and killed his father years ago during a bank robbery. When Gridley tries to get Mark to fight, Micah puts him in jail, and Lou steps in to reform the young boy.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: Will all the hard work the cowboys put in this season finally pay off? Cody is hoping the people of Bay Minette will come out in droves to make his rodeo a rousing success, while Misty puts on her game face to take another shot at barrel-racing glory. Andrew's bags are finally packed and he's clearing out. Though Bubba and Kaley hate to see him go, they also love watching him leave! Since the cowboys have been buying cattle left and right, word's gotten out about the Faith Cattle Company's trading business. This leads to Booger and Bubba boarding a private jet to meet some Texas investors looking to place a make-or-break order. As the guys hustle to gather all the cattle in time, they find themselves bidding against an old friend at the sale barn. Rodeo night brings all the families together - and even Andrew makes a surprise appearance. As the season draws to a close, the cowboys have everything on the line: their own money, as well as their reputations.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: A ranching job in Texas inspires Cody to try and modernize their business with the help of technology, but Booger and Bubba are hesitant that it will be successful. Booger visits Matthew's school during parent's week to teach his classmates about cowboying. Bubba struggles with being away from his family for work and feels the pressure to keep their business close to home. A life-changing opportunity for Booger to compete at a world-renowned colt-starting competition leaves Cody and Bubba excited for their friend, but nervous about what it will mean for their business.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The residents force Miss Adams, the North Fork schoolteacher, to leave her job because they feel she is too progressive for supporting women's right to vote. Lucas gets involved and he learns that lies have been circulated by a past student.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas has a disdain for Oat Jackford since years ago he burned down his ranch to get him off property he wanted. When hired killer Tom King arrives in North Fork and is on Oat's trail, Lucas decides to side with and help the man he once hated.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: Captain Wilton Parmenter, known for his good, but often clumsy intentions, wants to capture a wild stallion for Wrangler Jane. However, Sergeant O' Rourke, always looking to make some money, intends to capture the horse and sell it to the circus.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: Count Sforza arrives at Fort Courage in a hearse with a pet crow he calls Brother. The men of F Troop think he's a vampire due to his pale complexion. When Wrangler Jane goes missing, they go to Sforza's spooky mansion.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: After Marshal Ed Masterson is shot while breaking up a barroom brawl, he hastily bans all firearms in Dodge City. Ed's swift proclamation is met with disdain by most townsfolk, including his own brothers, and places an even larger target on his back.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: After Marshal Ed Masterson is gunned down in Dodge City, his youngest brother, James, decides to follow in his footsteps and become a lawman. But when James' life is threatened, middle brother Bat Masterson races back from Arizona to protect his kin.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: When former slave Jim Beckwourth heads west to seek work as a trapper, he begins what will become one of the most eventful, heroic lives of all the mountain men. As a joke, one of Beckwourth's fellow trappers tells a group of Crow warriors that Beckwourth is a long-lost member of their tribe, and the adventure begins. Adopted by the Crow, Beckwourth joins them in a series of ferocious battles with other tribes, becomes a war chief, and falls in love with a fierce female warrior named Pine Leaf. He then uses his hard-won influence with the Crow to convince them to provide furs to the powerful American Fur Company. But an unexpected visit from legendary trapper and old friend Tom Fitzpatrick sets off a violent collision that forces Beckwourth to choose between the two worlds he loves.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: A young man named Jesse is out for revenge on a gang of outlaws responsible for his guardian's death. The riders befriend and protect Jesse by stepping in and taking him to Rock Creek before it is too late.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne leads a wagon train and goes through Apache territory. Along the way, he meets a band of braves and tries to free a teenage captive from them. However, the young man isn't sure that he wants to be free.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne travels with an outlaw gang led by the Ghost of the Cimarron. The gang forces him to aid a wounded gunman. Danger looms for Cheyenne as he is mistaken as a gang member by lawmen and their posse.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A vile and murderous sheepherder, Jeb Drummond, contrives a plan to have Adam Cartwright taken hostage in an attempt to blackmail Ben and force him to sign over a large section of Ponderosa land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The big day finally arrives in North Fork as the first train comes to town. Onboard are Lucas and Mark along with a Japanese nobleman and his servant. When bullies harass the foreign visitors, the pair quickly teaches them a lesson in good manners.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: On Halloween, Mark and his friends wear masks and go from ranch to ranch to play pranks. Knowing the boys will be blamed, rustlers wear similar masks to steal cattle. Lucas thinks the boys are mixed up in the theft, until he finds out the truth.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While returning from a hunting trip, Lucas and Mark meet Marshal Micah Torrance who is escorting prisoner Scully Potter to trial. Later in camp, Lucas' life is suddenly in danger when a rattlesnake is found in his bedroll. Potter tries to escape.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas wants to kill an old enemy, Reef Jackson, who is coming to North Fork. In the past, Jackson shot Lucas in the back and tried to steal his wife. Micah puts Lucas in jail to stop him from getting his revenge. Meanwhile, Mark wants to bag an elk.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: Will all the hard work the cowboys put in this season finally pay off? Cody is hoping the people of Bay Minette will come out in droves to make his rodeo a rousing success, while Misty puts on her game face to take another shot at barrel-racing glory. programme.desc: After Marshal Ed Masterson is shot while breaking up a barroom brawl, he hastily bans all firearms in Dodge City. Ed's swift proclamation is met with disdain by most townsfolk, including his own brothers, and places an even larger target on his back.

programme.desc: Cheyenne leads a wagon train and goes through Apache territory. Along the way, he meets a band of braves and tries to free a teenage captive from them. However, the young man isn't sure that he wants to be free.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne travels with an outlaw gang led by the Ghost of the Cimarron. The gang forces him to aid a wounded gunman. Danger looms for Cheyenne as he is mistaken as a gang member by lawmen and their posse.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A vile and murderous sheepherder, Jeb Drummond, contrives a plan to have Adam Cartwright taken hostage in an attempt to blackmail Ben and force him to sign over a large section of Ponderosa land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The big day finally arrives in North Fork as the first train comes to town. Onboard are Lucas and Mark along with a Japanese nobleman and his servant. When bullies harass the foreign visitors, the pair quickly teaches them a lesson in good manners.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: On Halloween, Mark and his friends wear masks and go from ranch to ranch to play pranks. Knowing the boys will be blamed, rustlers wear similar masks to steal cattle. Lucas thinks the boys are mixed up in the theft, until he finds out the truth.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While returning from a hunting trip, Lucas and Mark meet Marshal Micah Torrance who is escorting prisoner Scully Potter to trial. Later in camp, Lucas' life is suddenly in danger when a rattlesnake is found in his bedroll. Potter tries to escape.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas wants to kill an old enemy, Reef Jackson, who is coming to North Fork. In the past, Jackson shot Lucas in the back and tried to steal his wife. Micah puts Lucas in jail to stop him from getting his revenge. Meanwhile, Mark wants to bag an elk.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: With no plans on how to expand their business in sight, the cowboys head to Texas for work. After attending a special cattle sale for Misty's business, Full Moon Cattle, Cody comes up with a possible new business venture. Booger begins training for the Road to the Horse competition, but things don't go smoothly. Feeling like he's in over his head, he receives good advice from an unexpected source. A hand injury affects how much work Bubba can do, but he uses the downtime to build a mock obstacle course for Booger. Kaley tells Bubba about her desire to get into real estate and encourages him to think about a possible career change. Booger challenges Misty to compete against him in the obstacle course, and Jaclyn receives a crash course in barrel racing.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: Booger heads to Austin to work with a former contestant in preparation for the Road to the Horse competition. He quickly realizes that there's more to this competition than handling a colt, and presentation has a lot to do with his score. Cody finds the perfect herd to start a special cattle sale and shares his idea for the business with Bubba, but he is hesitant. Once Booger is back, the cowboys meet to discuss the future of their business, but they don't all see eye-to-eye. Cody and Bubba want to be supportive of Booger but are frustrated that his dedication to the Road to the Horse competition has taken priority over their business. The lack of direction causes tension between the cowboys. Feeling divided, they all start to question the future of their business.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A trail bum rides into North Fork during one of the worst droughts in years. He claims that he can bring rain to their town. Many believe that he's a water witcher, but a railroad boss resents his intrusion and wants him gone.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas finds a wounded man, takes him to the North Fork doctor, and gives blood to help save the stranger's life. Marshal Torrance won't help as he says he knows the man and wants him dead. Things become more complicated when vigilantes ride to town.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: Corporal Agarn decides to leave the army and Fort Courage to become the manager of a rock band called The Bedbugs. The group appeals to Agarn as they seem ahead of their time. Not to be outdone, O'Rourke forms a group called The Termites.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: Agarn is escorting a dangerous prisoner but the man escapes. Agarn reports the incident to his major, only to find out that he must take the man's place in prison. O'Rourke goes after the prisoner, but tragedy unfolds.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: When homesteaders keep cutting down her fences to access grazing land and water, a widowed landowner teams up with famed Texas Ranger Ira Aten to protect her property. Aten hopes his explosive plan of action will force the cutters to compromise.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: For months, a thin wall of rock is all that keeps the peace between two rival silver mining companies 300 feet below the Idaho desert. When the barrier is finally breached, pickaxes give way to pistols and rifles, and the miners battle for five days.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: As a fur trapper, hunter, scout, and explorer, Kit Carson is an irresistible subject for reporters and novelists, and his incredible adventures make him a mythic figure in his own lifetime. Yet fame is the last thing on Carson's mind in 1849. All he wants to do is settle down to a quiet life with his wife on the family ranch, but once again fate comes calling. When settler Ann White is captured by an Apache raiding party, the Army seeks out Carson to help track the warriors and rescue Mrs. White, whose husband was killed in the raid. Although known to be the best tracker in the history of the Western Frontier, Carson admits this is the most difficult trail he has ever followed. He leads the military on a desperate chase, tracking the Apache through 200 miles of treacherous western wilderness. When they finally catch up with the Apache, the aftermath leaves Carson haunted for the rest of his days.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: Lou, Jimmy, and The Kid are on a mission of taking a long-sought-after outlaw to hang. On the way, The Kid is injured, but the others continue without him. They are confronted by a vindictive ex-sheriff who's bent on killing the man before he hangs.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne takes on the role of trail boss to help a woman get her herd of cattle to town. He realizes that the man he shot in self-defense is her late husband. More problems arise when he deals with a crew of disobedient trail hands.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne joins in the search for a missing 10-year-old boy along with the help of a Sioux boy named Char. While the boy finds himself trapped by a cave-in, the locals find his horse nearby and suspect the Sioux took him.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When a U.S. Marshal arrests one of the Ponderosa's workers for murder and takes him to Los Angeles for trial, Hoss and Adam go to make sure the marshal doesn't kill the accused before they get there.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While traveling, Lucas rescues a man named Griff, a corrupt gambling hall owner. When he reports Griff to the marshal, Lucas learns that a missing friend of his is dead and the marshal is using a new science called ballistics to solve the crime.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is paralyzed after falling off his horse. When Doc Burrage suggests that warm mineral baths could help him recover, Lucas and Lou take Mark to the old Mission Springs. However, danger lies ahead when escapees arrive.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A charming man named Mario Rosati arrives at the McCain Ranch and introduces himself as an acquaintance of an old family friend. Lucas and Mark offer him a place to stay for a few days, but they learn that he has an ulterior motive: to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old man named Sam Gibbs comes to North Fork in need of Marshal Micah Torrance's protection from criminals who are after him. Sam happens to be Mark's grandfather and Lucas' deceased wife's father. Lucas finds peace with his past and helps Sam.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way

programme.desc: Lou, Jimmy, and The Kid are on a mission of taking a long-sought-after outlaw to hang. On the way, The Kid is injured, but the others continue without him. They are confronted by a vindictive ex-sheriff who's bent on killing the man before he hangs.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne takes on the role of trail boss to help a woman get her herd of cattle to town. He realizes that the man he shot in self-defense is her late husband. More problems arise when he deals with a crew of disobedient trail hands.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne joins in the search for a missing 10-year-old boy along with the help of a Sioux boy named Char. While the boy finds himself trapped by a cave-in, the locals find his horse nearby and suspect the Sioux took him.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When a U.S. Marshal arrests one of the Ponderosa's workers for murder and takes him to Los Angeles for trial, Hoss and Adam go to make sure the marshal doesn't kill the accused before they get there.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While traveling, Lucas rescues a man named Griff, a corrupt gambling hall owner. When he reports Griff to the marshal, Lucas learns that a missing friend of his is dead and the marshal is using a new science called ballistics to solve the crime.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is paralyzed after falling off his horse. When Doc Burrage suggests that warm mineral baths could help him recover, Lucas and Lou take Mark to the old Mission Springs. However, danger lies ahead when escapees arrive.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A charming man named Mario Rosati arrives at the McCain Ranch and introduces himself as an acquaintance of an old family friend. Lucas and Mark offer him a place to stay for a few days, but they learn that he has an ulterior motive: to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old man named Sam Gibbs comes to North Fork in need of Marshal Micah Torrance's protection from criminals who are after him. Sam happens to be Mark's grandfather and Lucas' deceased wife's father. Lucas finds peace with his past and helps Sam.

programme.title: The Gambler
programme.desc: When a card shark receives a letter from a distant and troubled son, he travels to rescue the boy and his mother. During a train ride, the gambler meets a friendly, prideful young card player and shares his wisdom.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Coming home from school, Mark stumbles upon a dead man's body. Lucas discovers he was stabbed and the only clue is a belt with the initials R.M. Lucas leaves Mark with Artemus Quarles, a cousin who is visiting. Quarles, however, is not who he seems.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A renegade Apache named Chaqua raids the McCain Ranch and kidnaps Mark. Lucas gathers a group of men to get Mark back, but Chaqua plans to make him an Apache warrior since he lost his own son. Lucas will stop at nothing to get his son back to safety.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Duke scouts a new passage through rough terrain. He meets a traveling preacher named Malachi Hobart during his trip. However, he soon discovers that Hobart is nothing more than a con man. Duke devises a plan to expose him.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: After the suspicious death of a tunnel worker, and unconvincing answers from the project's lead engineer, Doc Susie goes on a covert mission to find out what happened. Deep underground, she finds her own life in peril when she's trapped by a cave-in.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: In his first week on the job as the new constable of Jerome, Arizona, Jim Roberts gets to work arresting the town's troublemakers and teaching his timid deputy how to be a courageous lawman as they track down a stone-cold killer and his gang.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: In his quest to become king of the fur trade, William Sublette revolutionizes the industry and puts his life on the line in the process. But he may risk too much when he rushes to save his comrades in the largest battle of the mountain man era.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: After getting in an argument with a Union Army recruiter, Noah becomes the prime suspect of murder when the recruiter turns up dead. The riders become involved in the investigation. Meanwhile, Noah befriends Quinn and his sister Cassie.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When a member of a powerful gang of outlaws murders a local shopkeeper, the killer is sentenced to be hanged. The leader of the gang kidnaps Ben and holds him hostage in an attempt to gain the killer's freedom.

programme.title: The Young Land
programme.desc: When an American gunslinger kills a Mexican man in California immediately in the aftermath of the Mexican-American War, he is arrested and put on trial for murder. The local population is anxious to see if justice will prevail.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: Bubba and Kaley welcome their baby girl into the world. When they get home from the hospital, Kaley surprises Bubba with a special gift. Cody lands a big contracting job with a local rancher, but the work needs to be completed in a week. He needs this job to fund the construction of his dream home, so he must get the work done somehow. Booger is beginning to think that Jaclyn might be the one, so he decides to introduce her to his grandma. Finally, the whole gang gets together for a Faith Cattle family barbecue to meet baby Andie.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: This special edition of The Cowboy Way: Alabama revisits the action from Season One as cowboy trio Bubba, Cody and Booger build their cattle business. Of course the guys have their hands full wrangling cattle and taming unruly horses, but their personal lives are just as action-packed. Newlyweds Bubba and Cody are getting used to being family men, while Booger struggles through a series of dates on a quest to find the love of his life. Chock-full of season highlights as well as hilarious never-before-seen outtakes, it's an entertaining look at the cowboy way of life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A mail-order husband arrives in North Fork, and finds not only a bride, but also harassment from two local troublemakers.

programme.title: The Gambler
programme.desc: When a card shark receives a letter from a distant and troubled son, he travels to rescue the boy and his mother. During a train ride, the gambler meets a friendly, prideful young card player and shares his wisdom.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Coming home from school, Mark stumbles upon a dead man's body. Lucas discovers he was stabbed and the only clue is a belt with the initials R.M. Lucas leaves Mark with Artemus Quarles, a cousin who is visiting. Quarles, however, is not who he seems.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A renegade Apache named Chaqua raids the McCain Ranch and kidnaps Mark. Lucas gathers a group of men to get Mark back, but Chaqua plans to make him an Apache warrior since he lost his own son. Lucas will stop at nothing to get his son back to safety.

programme.title: Handcrafted America
programme.desc: Host Jill Wagner travels the country to find artisans who make handcrafted products that celebrate the Western way of life. In Arizona, we meet a custom hat maker who made his first hat at 12. In Texas, there's a shop teacher turned quality spur maker, and a leather worker with talent beyond his years. In Colorado, a team of belt buckle makers craft Western themed buckles. In California, a Frenchman named Pedro crafts leather saddles and a young boot maker is inspired by the style of the 1950s. And in Tennessee, a legendary father/ son team make unique leather chinks.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: After the suspicious death of a tunnel worker, and unconvincing answers from the project's lead engineer, Doc Susie goes on a covert mission to find out what happened. Deep underground, she finds her own life in peril when she's trapped by a cave-in.

programme.desc: After getting in an argument with a Union Army recruiter, Noah becomes the prime suspect of murder when the recruiter turns up dead. The riders become involved in the investigation. Meanwhile, Noah befriends Quinn and his sister Cassie.

programme.desc: When a member of a powerful gang of outlaws murders a local shopkeeper, the killer is sentenced to be hanged. The leader of the gang kidnaps Ben and holds him hostage in an attempt to gain the killer's freedom.

Chock-full of season highlights as well as hilarious never-before-seen outtakes, it's an entertaining look at the cowboy way of life.

programme.title: They Call Me Trinity
programme.desc: When a land-hungry rancher sends his bullies to harass peace-loving Mormons into giving up their fertile valley, a lazy gunfighter with a very quick draw and amazing accuracy, along with his horse-thieving brother, come to the settlers' rescue.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The big day finally arrives in North Fork as the first train comes to town. Onboard are Lucas and Mark along with a Japanese nobleman and his servant. When bullies harass the foreign visitors, the pair quickly teaches them a lesson in good manners.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A vile and murderous sheepherder, Jeb Drummond, contrives a plan to have Adam Cartwright taken hostage in an attempt to blackmail Ben and force him to sign over a large section of Ponderosa land.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Naturalist William Bartram explores the unmapped regions of the South to document the native fauna and flora. After surviving many encounters with Native Americans and wildlife, it's an invisible virus that may finally end the journey and his life.

programme.title: Elkhorn
programme.desc: After suffering a great personal loss, 25-year-old Theodore Roosevelt abandons New York for the lawless Dakota Badlands. Along the way, he faces doubters and killers as he attempts to establish the Elkhorn Ranch and remake himself into a cattleman.

programme.title: Elkhorn
programme.desc: Before it's up and running, Theodore Roosevelt's new Elkhorn Ranch is threatened by a powerful neighbor who attempts an underhanded land grab. To save his ranch, Roosevelt confronts his neighbor, the Marquis de Morés, and his beguiling wife, Medora.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Wes Carney, a famous gunfighter, and his new wife Clair move to North Fork. They open a store and settle down. However, three outlaws come to town to challenge him. Carney refuses and they ransack his store, forcing him to put his gunbelt back on.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Abel Goss is doing a portrait of Mark standing on a North Fork street. Suddenly he sees Colonel Whiteside and his sidekick, Jamison. When he recognizes them as the cruel men who tortured him in a Civil War prison camp, problems soon arise.

programme.title: The Sundowners
programme.desc: When a dispute over grazing rights to a fertile canyon leads to cattle rustling, the rustling ignites a range war, turning two brothers against one another. Will both brothers survive the deadly conflict between them?

programme.title: Rio Diablo
programme.desc: When a just-married couple is caught in the middle of a bank robbery, the bride is taken by the robbers. Now, the groom and a skilled bounty hunter search for the gang, hoping to find the bride alive.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find a wounded man and bring him into North Fork to save his life. Lucas asks Simon Battle, a gunfighter-turned-doctor, to help the man. The wounded man's enemies have other plans in store.

programme.title: They Call Me Trinity
programme.desc: When a land-hungry rancher sends his bullies to harass peace-loving Mormons into giving up their fertile valley, a lazy gunfighter with a very quick draw and amazing accuracy, along with his horse-thieving brother, come to the settlers' rescue.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The big day finally arrives in North Fork as the first train comes to town. Onboard are Lucas and Mark along with a Japanese nobleman and his servant. When bullies harass the foreign visitors, the pair quickly teaches them a lesson in good manners.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Abel Goss is doing a portrait of Mark standing on a North Fork street. Suddenly he sees Colonel Whiteside and his sidekick, Jamison. When he recognizes them as the cruel men who tortured him in a Civil War prison camp, problems soon arise.

programme.title: The Sundowners
programme.desc: When a dispute over grazing rights to a fertile canyon leads to cattle rustling, the rustling ignites a range war, turning two brothers against one another. Will both brothers survive the deadly conflict between them?

programme.title: Rio Diablo
programme.desc: When a just-married couple is caught in the middle of a bank robbery, the bride is taken by the robbers. Now, the groom and a skilled bounty hunter search for the gang, hoping to find the bride alive.

programme.title: Gunslinger
programme.desc: When a town marshal is gunned down, his wife bravely returns fire at the gunmen and kills one. The widow is named the town's temporary marshal. At her husband's funeral, she spies the second killer and plans to finish avenging her husband.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: North Fork welcomes new minister, Reverand Jamison, Lucas' enemy and a gunslinger who forced people off their land 25 years ago. Lucas soon realizes Jamison has reformed, but still faces danger from his past.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: Yellow Bird is a white woman who was abducted as a child by Apaches and raised as one of their own. Her father, a wealthy Texan, finds her and wants her to return home. She agrees, but only if she can marry Captain Parmenter in the process.

programme.title: The Ballot of Corporal Agarn
programme.desc: Two mayoral candidates from Agarn's hometown of Passaic, New Jersey, travel to Fort Courage to get his vote. With the election tied, each candidate needs Agarn's absentee ballot to win. O'Rourke schemes on a way to make Agarn's decision pay off.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: While out on a run delivering a top-secret message, Cody encounters a wounded mountain man who wants him to care for his pet bear. Meanwhile, in Sweetwater, the other riders care for an abandoned baby.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: There is a new girl in Sweetwater, and she has eyes for Buck. However, Buck must contend with her rich, oppressive father. Meanwhile, the riders help a woman in need after the corrupt banker's henchmen kill her husband.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sam Elder unexpectedly dies after the bank forecloses on his ranch Lucas takes in his son, who is now orphaned. Lucas teaches the boy how to use a gun, but Lucas doesn't know the boy plans to get revenge on the banker.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Rancher John Hallager is shot and killed in North Fork and young Billy Mathis is a prime suspect. Billy was seeing Hallager's daughter but was told to stay away. Lucas believes in Billy's innocence, and a clue may help.

programme.title: The Proud Rebel
programme.desc: A Confederate veteran battles prejudice and greed as he helps a woman save her ranch from a land grab, while searching for a cure for his mute son.

programme.title: My Name Is Nobody
programme.desc: A young and easy-going drifter befriends a legendary gunslinger who wants to retire. The drifter considers the shooter his hero and insists that he must face a gang of 150 outlaws before he can lay down his guns.

programme.title: Cavalry Charge
programme.desc: When two brothers each decide to fight on opposite sides in the Civil War, they never dreamed they would need to reunite and fight together. It is the only chance they have, if they hope to survive a brutal Indian attack.

programme.title: Gunslinger
programme.desc: When a town marshal is gunned down, his wife bravely returns fire at the gunmen and kills one. The widow is named the town's temporary marshal. At her husband's funeral, she spies the second killer and plans to finish avenging her husband.

programme.desc: Sam Elder unexpectedly dies after the bank forecloses on his ranch Lucas takes in his son, who is now orphaned. Lucas teaches the boy how to use a gun, but Lucas doesn't know the boy plans to get revenge on the banker.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Rancher John Hallager is shot and killed in North Fork and young Billy Mathis is a prime suspect. Billy was seeing Hallager's daughter but was told to stay away. Lucas believes in Billy's innocence, and a clue may help.

programme.title: The Proud Rebel
programme.desc: A Confederate veteran battles prejudice and greed as he helps a woman save her ranch from a land grab, while searching for a cure for his mute son.

programme.title: My Name Is Nobody
programme.desc: A young and easy-going drifter befriends a legendary gunslinger who wants to retire. The drifter considers the shooter his hero and insists that he must face a gang of 150 outlaws before he can lay down his guns.

programme.title: Cavalry Charge
programme.desc: When two brothers each decide to fight on opposite sides in the Civil War, they never dreamed they would need to reunite and fight together. It is the only chance they have, if they hope to survive a brutal Indian attack.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The cowboys are unable to decide on exactly how they want to move their business forward. In the meantime, they continue to take day jobs to stay afloat. With Cody still fixated on the specialty cattle sale, Misty encourages him to do it on his own, without the help of Bubba and Booger. A new opportunity falls in Bubba's lap to operate a ranch for a group of organic feed investors. While it seems to be a dream role for Bubba, he struggles with the fact that it would require him to move his family north and away from the other cowboys. After much anticipation and practice, Booger heads to Kentucky for the Road to the Horse competition, where he faces the challenge of managing an unruly horse.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: With Booger still at the Road to the Horse competition, Cody and Bubba are left to do the day-to-day work. Bubba surprises Cody with news that he has to head to Mississippi to help his father-in-law. Cody has to take care of the ranch by himself, adding to his frustrations with the business. Luckily for him, Misty steps in to help. Bubba breaks the news to Kaley's parents that they might be moving north for a new job opportunity. After a bit of hesitation, they show their support - just in time for Bubba and Kaley to check out a ranch that could potentially be their future home. Cody visits possible sites for his specialty cattle sale and feels discouraged until he comes across the perfect location. Meanwhile, Booger starts the second round in the Road to the Horse competition, and things don't go as planned. In the end, he makes a tough decision and puts what's best for the horse ahead of winning.

programme.title: Outlaw's Inheritance
programme.desc: The townspeople of North Fork begin to get suspicious when Lucas is named as the beneficiary in the will of an infamous outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sam Elder unexpectedly dies after the bank forecloses on his ranch Lucas takes in his son, who is now orphaned. Lucas teaches the boy how to use a gun, but Lucas doesn't know the boy plans to get revenge on the banker.

programme.title: Red Sun
programme.desc: In 1870, a gang robs a train carrying Japanese diplomats. The gang takes an ornate Japanese sword meant as a gift for the U.S. president. Now, a gunman and samurai must lay their differences aside and work together to recover the priceless gift.

programme.title: County Line: No Fear
programme.desc: When Sheriff Alden Rockwell finally decides to retire, a threat against the father of his friend, Sheriff Jo Porter, may not only ruin his plans for a life of leisure but also bring a dangerous criminal syndicate to both Maksville and York counties.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne finds a wounded man in Mexico and takes him to a doctor in a local village. Once he arrives, he learns that a dangerous bandit is there to avenge two of his men's deaths by destroying the village.

programme.title: Elkhorn
programme.desc: Theodore Roosevelt's early efforts to become a cattleman are jeopardized when a neighboring rancher accuses his men of rustling cattle. To save Elkhorn's reputation, Roosevelt and his men must capture the real thief and return the stolen livestock.

programme.title: Elkhorn
programme.desc: After some of Theodore Roosevelt's new horses are stolen, he joins a posse of vigilantes to hunt down the thieves. When they capture a lone outcast who swears his innocence, Roosevelt learns firsthand that frontier justice isn't always just.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Jackman clan must sell their farm to pay back taxes. The Jackmans were not much at farming so they move to a nearby town and take jobs as peace officers. When bank robbers confront them, Lucas must step in and help them deal with the outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Old Tony, an irritable old recluse, has a reputation in North Fork as being a mean hermit. When Mark and his girlfriend, Lorrie, look for arrowheads on his land, they become trapped in quicksand. Tony shows his good-hearted nature and rescues them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain and his son, Mark, arrive in North Fork to purchase a ranch. When Lucas enters a turkey shoot to win money for a down payment, he soon finds himself at odds with town villain Jim Lewis.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas buys his ranch, hired hands of a wealthy cattleman demand he leave. When Lucas refuses, the men beat him, drag him, and then they burn his ranch house to the ground. Lucas tracks these men down and confronts their boss, Oat Jackford.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas buys his ranch, hired hands of a wealthy cattleman demand he leave. When Lucas refuses, the men beat him, drag him, and then they burn his ranch house to the ground. Lucas tracks these men down and confronts their boss, Oat Jackford.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: While volunteering with kids in the community, Cody makes a connection with a possible buyer for his specialty cattle sale. With Booger still away at the Road to the Horse competition, Cody and Bubba recruit a friend to help with the work on the ranch. Cody rushes to finish up for the day, determined to make it home in time for his son's first haircut, but in his haste, he ends up hurting himself. Bubba visits an organic ranch in Texas to learn more about the organic business. To test the product, he cooks up store brand and grass-fed steaks to compare the taste and make sure it is something he can get behind. Booger finally gets home after the competition and immediately receives an opportunity to train horses in Austin. After spending some time apart, the cowboys come together to talk about the future of their partnership. Things take a turn for the worse when the meeting between friends gets heated, leaving the fate of their business up in the air.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: When their conversation about their partnership hits a wall, each cowboy decides to branch out and focus on their individual pursuits. Booger completes a job for an acquaintance who asks him to find a horse for his teenage granddaughter. The search for the right horse proves to be challenging, but he finally finds one gentle enough for an amateur rider. The experience reminds Booger of how passionate he is about working with horses, and he decides to accept the offer to train them in Austin. Struggling to find buyers for his specialty cattle sale, Cody meets with the Cattle Association Board to pitch the specialty sale to them and secure buyers. Bubba heads north to show the investors a location for the organic ranch, but when they don't show up, he starts to wonder if this deal was a big mistake. Booger, Cody, and Bubba meet up and decide to sell off their entire herd, officially putting their partnership on hold. Jaclyn comes up with a plan to mend Booger and Cody's friendship.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Rancher John Hallager is shot and killed in North Fork and young Billy Mathis is a prime suspect. Billy was seeing Hallager's daughter but was told to stay away. Lucas believes in Billy's innocence, and a clue may help.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sully Hobbs and his outlaw gang ride to North Fork intent on taking over the town. They must first get rid of Lucas McCain without involving themselves. To do so, the gang forces the barber to fight Lucas, but Lucas suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: Corporal Agarn's attractive Russian Cossack cousin, Colonel Agarnoff, captivates Wrangler Jane with his horsemanship skills. His charming demeanor threatens to steal her away from Captain Parmenter, who is managing his visit to Fort Courage.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: A visiting colonel arrives at Fort Courage. He is convinced that someone from the F Troop is supplying guns to the Apache Indians. Captain Parmenter, along with O'Rourke and Agarn, take action by going undercover to nab the guilty gunrunner.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: In an odd twist of fate, photographers C.S. and Mollie Fly decide to open a studio next to a dusty corral in Tombstone, Arizona, and they end up taking the last shot of the Old West's most infamous gunbattle, the Shootout at the O.K. Corral.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: It's not gold that inspires a rush of treasure hunters to flood the windblown bluffs of Wyoming: it's bones. After stumbling upon a strange fossil, a man is caught in the crossfire of rival paleontologists warring over a trove of dinosaur bones.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: A teenaged Joe Meek arrives on the frontier as a greenhorn, but he quickly masters the skills of mountain man life. Just as his trapping career is taking off, he faces a life-or-death challenge when he's taken captive by warriors from the Crow tribe.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: Ike meets and falls in love with Emily Metcalfe. When a card shark named Neville murders her gambler father, Emily seeks revenge. Ike intervenes in her plans to try to protect her, but suffers from a gunshot in the process.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne goes on the hunt for his partner when he doesn't return from a private business trip. He leaves to hunt for him and learns that he is wounded and in jail. Later, Cheyenne deals with an estate and lawyer.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: With his friend, Jim O'Neil's hanging scheduled for the next day, Cheyenne visits him in Texas. Jim refuses to tell Cheyenne any details, but Cheyenne uncovers the missing clue that prevents his innocent friend's hanging.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: An inspector comes from New Orleans to Virginia City intending to arrest Ben Cartwright for a murder committed 20 years ago. Ben now must travel to New Orleans to stand trial and considers withdrawing from the governor's race.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A young outlaw named Will Fulton saves Mark's life but breaks a leg in the process. He mends at Lucas' ranch, and there meets the lovely Ann Bard. The outlaw begins to soften and reassesses his choices and path in life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Micah Torrance, formerly a famous marshal, who is now a drunk crippled from a gunfight, stumbles into North Fork. Lucas McCain hires him in hopes of rehabilitating the man. The good deed quickly backfires when outlaws arrive.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's uncle, Johnny Gibb, a famous rodeo rider, comes to visit. Mark idolizes his uncle, but Lucas soon discovers that Johnny is on the run from the law after robbing an express office, and is afraid that Johnny is a bad influence on young Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Corrupt Judge Burton seeks justice against those who are responsible for the hanging of his son, including Lucas McCain, who caught him. When Burton discovers that Lucas has a son, he captures Lucas to make him watch Mark suffer the same punishment.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: While volunteering with kids in the community, Cody makes a connection with a possible buyer for his specialty cattle sale. With Booger still away at the Road to the Horse competition, Cody and Bubba recruit a friend to help with the work on the ranch. Cody rushes to finish up for the day, determined to make it home in time for his son's first haircut, but in his haste, he ends up hurting himself. Bubba visits an organic ranch in Texas to learn more about the organic business. To test the product, he cooks up store brand and grass-fed steaks to compare the taste and make sure it is something he can get behind. Booger finally gets home after the competition and immediately receives an opportunity to train horses in Austin. After spending some time apart, the cowboys come together to talk about the future of their partnership. Things take a turn for the worse when the meeting between friends gets heated, leaving the fate of their business up in the air.
