programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 3
programme.desc: Connecting North America's Great Lakes with the Atlantic Ocean, the Saint Lawrence is one of the largest and most important waterways in the world. It's also home to some of the most diverse and inspiring landscapes, like Les Iles de la Madeleine, a breathtaking chain of islands with endless sand beaches, spectacular sea caves and a charming small town vibe. This week on Facing Waves, we're visiting Quebec City and Les Iles de la Madeleine.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 4
programme.desc: What makes Canada's largest provinces so great is how big and rugged the landscape is. This means there are endless opportunities for outdoor adventure. Less than an hour from the cities of Montreal and Ottawa, the Laurentians is one of the most accessible regions of Quebec and one of the top adventure spots in the country. This week we will discover the Laurentians and Authentic Quebec.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 3 World Cup Tacen
programme.desc: We are in stage three of the Canoe Slalom World Cup, and this time we will be competing on the water of Ljubljana, in Tacen. The racing conditions are perfect and we are focused on the final: men will be competing in C1 and women in K1. Matej Benus who was leading the standings in the men's category will not be competing in the final, so Benjamin Savsek has a chance to step up in the podium. Relive the best moments of the third stage of the 2018 Canoe Slalom World Cup in Tacen.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 4 World Cup Markkleeberg
programme.desc: We are in Markkleeberg, Germany, for round four of the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup. This is the third time this venue hosts a World Cup, and 183 athletes from 26 countries have enrolled, competing for points across the five-race World Cup. As we are a month away from the olympic qualifiers and World Championships in Spain, we are ready for a sharp end of the 2019 international racing season. Discover the best moments in Markkleeberg on Nautical Channel!

programme.title: Locked In
programme.desc: Located just a few degrees south of the equator, Papua New Guinea is a tapestry of virgin rainforest, unique cultures and an expansive coastline. Pouring out of its ‘Nakanai Plateau’ is the Beriman River. Over 40km in length from source to sea, it drops more than 2,000m before reaching the Solomon Sea.The Beriman Gorge’s mysterious and towering canyon walls have never before been explored. Kayakers Ben Stookesberry, Chris Korbulic, Ben Marr and Pedro Oliva set out to conquer these previously unchartered whitewater rapids.This is one of kayaking’s most significant challenges and during the 13-day expedition, their skills and patience are pushed to their limits. They navigate twelve distinct gorges, numerous class-5 rapids, inescapable vertical walls, fluctuating water levels and dense jungle cover. All of these untamed natural obstacles stand in the way of the quartet’s successful first descent.

programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 1
programme.desc: We arrive to the port to meet Chef Panos and invite him onboard to try a delicious recipe: linguine with shrimps. The Chef Panos will show us the Greek heritage in the food and a secret ingredient he uses to give his plates his own taste. Then, we go around the port to see whether if we can share this delicious platter with strangers. Then, we meet Chef Nikos to discover a special recipe he has for us.

programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 2
programme.desc: In today's episode, we are meeting Chef Dimitri who has a special surprise prepared for us. He will join us on our boat to prepare a unique fish soup, and we are ready to share this delicacy with the people in the port. We will also be meeting Chef Kostas who has his own recipe for pasta with tuna. Come on board and try it out!

programme.title: The Barrel
programme.desc: Since the first wave was ridden, surfers have shared stories and experiences to try to explain the wonders inside the waves they ride.Professional and amateur surfers, photographers and videographers around the world have the possibility to display their passion: Barrel surfing. This term is used by surfers to describe riding well inside the curve of a finely shaped breaking wave, for many described as magical.The Barrel is all about surfer’s skills, creativity and love for adventure as they look for the best waves for tube riding. Get inside the barrel of the wave, with Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 1

programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship Oﬀshore has started its new season in the European City of Sport for 2019, Portimao, Portugal. It attracts the world’s top male and female riders from around the globe who compete on cutting edge equipment, delivering a mix of fast paced racing, nail biting action and non-stop excitement. More than 70 riders from 26 countries will battle in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2.In this episode, we will focus on all the ski action from the Grand Prix of Portugal.

programme.title: Les Voiles de Saint Tropez - 20 Years Of Les Voiles De St Tropez
programme.desc: Join Nautical Channel for a full coverage of one of the most awaited nautical events in the world. We will bring you to the most exclusive events and have special insights with the best athletes and all the VIPs. We will show you what it feels like to be on board on an ultra-modern super yacht during a match race in the legendary bay of Brigitte Bardot and also take a look around inside some of the most amazing classic yachts that ever sailed.

programme.desc: Foiling Week - Episode 1

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 2 - Korcula – Stari Grad
programme.desc: Korcula is often referred as a little Dubrovnik and we will show you why is that. We will taste some amazing cuisine and attend Moreska dance that is preserved from the Middle Ages and it is performed only here on island of Korcula. After Korcula we visit beautiful Stari Grad town on the island of Hvar and wonder it's amazing old streets.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 3 - Vrboska - Split
programme.desc: Small city of Vrboska is a little piece of paradise for yachtsmen and Split is the biggest city in Dalmatia. We will show you where to go, what to see, and of course, some amazing food suggestions.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 3 World Cup Tacen
programme.desc: We are in stage three of the Canoe Slalom World Cup, and this time we will be competing on the water of Ljubljana, in Tacen. The racing conditions are perfect and we are focused on the final: men will be competing in C1 and women in K1. Matej Benus who was leading the standings in the men's category will not be competing in the final, so Benjamin Savsek has a chance to step up in the podium. Relive the best moments of the third stage of the 2018 Canoe Slalom World Cup in Tacen.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 4 World Cup Markkleeberg
programme.desc: We are in Markkleeberg, Germany, for round four of the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup. This is the third time this venue hosts a World Cup, and 183 athletes from 26 countries have enrolled, competing for points across the five-race World Cup. As we are a month away from the olympic qualifiers and World Championships in Spain, we are ready for a sharp end of the 2019 international racing season. Discover the best moments in Markkleeberg on Nautical Channel!

programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 5
programme.desc: In tonight's episode the Clipper Race fleet takes on the Asia Pacific Leg, split across two stages with spectacular destinations in China; crews celebrate the Chinese New Year at sea and swelter in the backing tropical heat; there's a second visit by King Neptune as father and son cross the equator and loved ones missed on Valentines Day.

programme.title: Surfer's Blood
programme.desc: Renowned surf photographer and filmmaker Patrick Trefz explores the essence of the sport he loves by profiling those who inspire him. Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: PRADA Cup - Round Robin 1-2 Week 1
programme.desc: Every match of the PRADA Cup is a one-on-one duel of strategy and tactics, and time is of the essence. The Round Robins will define who will pass directly into the final and who, on the other hand, will have to compete in the semi-final before moving forward to the final.The first to win 7 races will move directly into the final of the competition. Luna Rossa Prada Pirelli, INEOS Team UK and NYYC American Magic are the three contenders in this year's Round Robin. Who will move on directly to the final? Find it out, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 2 Portimao, Portugal
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship Oﬀshore has started its new season in the European City of Sport for 2019, Portimao, Portugal. It attracts the world’s top male and female riders from around the globe who compete on cutting edge equipment, delivering a mix of fast paced racing, nail biting action and non-stop excitement. More than 70 riders from 26 countries will battle in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2.In this episode, we will focus on all the ski action from the Grand Prix of Portugal.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 3 World Cup Tacen
programme.desc: We are in stage three of the Canoe Slalom World Cup, and this time we will be competing on the water of Ljubljana, in Tacen. The racing conditions are perfect and we are focused on the final: men will be competing in C1 and women in K1. Matej Benus who was leading the standings in the men's category will not be competing in the final, so Benjamin Savsek has a chance to step up in the podium. Relive the best moments of the third stage of the 2018 Canoe Slalom World Cup in Tacen.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 4 World Cup Markkleeberg
programme.desc: We are in Markkleeberg, Germany, for round four of the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup. This is the third time this venue hosts a World Cup, and 183 athletes from 26 countries have enrolled, competing for points across the five-race World Cup. As we are a month away from the olympic qualifiers and World Championships in Spain, we are ready for a sharp end of the 2019 international racing season. Discover the best moments in Markkleeberg on Nautical Channel!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 2 - Korcula – Stari Grad
programme.desc: Korcula is often referred as a little Dubrovnik and we will show you why is that. We will taste some amazing cuisine and attend Moreska dance that is preserved from the Middle Ages and it is performed only here on island of Korcula. After Korcula we visit beautiful Stari Grad town on the island of Hvar and wonder it's amazing old streets.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 3 - Vrboska - Split
programme.desc: Small city of Vrboska is a little piece of paradise for yachtsmen and Split is the biggest city in Dalmatia. We will show you where to go, what to see, and of course, some amazing food suggestions.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 3
programme.desc: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 3

programme.title: Bol D'Or: The Swiss Do It Better
programme.desc: The Bol D’Or Mirabaud is the most important inland lake regatta in the world. Taking place in Switzerland, a landlocked nation that sits on top of the sailing world with multiple successes whether in the Olympic, Offshore or in Grand Prix Racing formats, and champion of two America’s Cup victories. The race started in 1939 and it is a symbolic race that brings together the best of Switzerland’s sailing tradition.Every year they welcome mono-hulls and multihulls on Lake Geneva, starting in the city of Geneva. More than 500 boats fight each other on this 123 kilometre (66.5 nautical miles) course from Geneva to Le Bouveret and back. It is a national treasure that every summer gathers thousands of spectators to the shores of Lake Geneva and really shows how the Swiss indeed do it better.Watch the race and become one with the beauty of Switzerland’s background, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The World Sailing Show - Episode 4
programme.desc: The World Sailing Show - Episode 4

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 4
programme.desc: Emirates Team New Zealand follows the script and gets the pass to take on the Defender for the 35th America's Cup Match. 100% fly-time, 40 knot match races, close scalls, close contact, a helmsmen going overboard... we will take an in depth look at safety in a modern day America's Cup. Then on exclusive: Franck Cammas encounters a rudder blade and we dive into the body gear for the AC50 crews with Thierry Fouchier.

programme.title: Tour De France à La Voile - Episode 1
programme.desc: Since 1978, the Tour de France à la voile has allowed thousands of sailors to discover the French coast. This yachting race is held in July every year and links the English Channel to the French Riviera. The tour is a great offshore sailing school for amateur sailors, and a high-level competition for the great champions taking part.

programme.title: Surfer's Blood
programme.desc: Renowned surf photographer and filmmaker Patrick Trefz explores the essence of the sport he loves by profiling those who inspire him. Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the sunny French Riviera for the 2016 Cannes Yachting Festival, a gathering in the name of luxury and excellence. In this year's edition, more than 200 models will be shown for the first time ever in the world. Let's find out the highlights of this incredible boat show.

programme.title: The Road To Bermuda - Episode 6
programme.desc: In this episode we catch up on the results from the World Series in Oman, go on a sailing adventure on the Spirit of Bermuda and get a windsurfing lesson with Upwind Sports. We celebrate Good Friday Bermuda style, get VIP access to a new America’s Cup Exhibit, and catch up with the America’s Cup Endeavour Programme and the Red Bull Youth America’s Cup hopefuls!

programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 1
programme.desc: We arrive to the port to meet Chef Panos and invite him onboard to try a delicious recipe: linguine with shrimps. The Chef Panos will show us the Greek heritage in the food and a secret ingredient he uses to give his plates his own taste. Then, we go around the port to see whether if we can share this delicious platter with strangers. Then, we meet Chef Nikos to discover a special recipe he has for us.

programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 2
programme.desc: In today's episode, we are meeting Chef Dimitri who has a special surprise prepared for us. He will join us on our boat to prepare a unique fish soup, and we are ready to share this delicacy with the people in the port. We will also be meeting Chef Kostas who has his own recipe for pasta with tuna. Come on board and try it out!

programme.desc: Korcula is often referred as a little Dubrovnik and we will show you why is that. After Korcula we visit beautiful Stari Grad town on the island of Hvar and wonder it's amazing old streets.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 4
programme.desc: Emirates Team New Zealand follows the script and gets the pass to take on the Defender for the 35th America's Cup Match. 100% fly-time, 40 knot match races, close scalls, close contact, a helmsmen going overboard... we will take an in depth look at safety in a modern day America's Cup. Then on exclusive: Franck Cammas encounters a rudder blade and we dive into the body gear for the AC50 crews with Thierry Fouchier.

programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 3
programme.desc: Chef Nikolaos is giving us a well-needed cooking lesson before jumping on board to prepare the recipe he has in store for us. He will also take the time to teach us how to find out whether if a fish is fresh or not before we go on and try the dish with the people from the port. Then, we are meeting with the young Chef Jason, who with only 19 years is the main chef at a 4-star hotel. He is cooking on board our boat, and we are excited to try out his dish.

programme.title: Flavours of Venice - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode, Andi takes us on a journey around the streets of Venice, the sinking city. We will discover unique stores that are sank underwater and learn more about the history and elements of the famous gondola. Then, we will be visiting the Ristorante Riviera by the hand of the Chef Cremonini and asking him to join us onboard to enjoy a delicious meal. Come join us!

programme.title: Wind Masters - Episode 7: Rab, Crikvenica and Novi Vinodolski
programme.desc: Wind Masters - Episode 7: Rab, Crikvenica and Novi Vinodolski

programme.title: Wind Masters - Episode 8: Senj, Cres, Losinj
programme.desc: Wind Masters - Episode 8: Senj, Cres, Losinj

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: The glamorous city of Cannes hosts the luxury Yachting Festival par excellence for the 40th time this year and a new Luxury Gallery has been opened in the Palais de Festivals to celebrate this landmark anniversary. Breathe in the boat show’s opulence and learn about the latest trends in the yachting world!

programme.title: Guadeloupe: Caribbean Blues
programme.desc: A visit to Guadeloupe is like visiting all corners of our world’s beauty. Looking to the left you can catch a breeze that swifts a kite surfer in the air, and to the right a gust of smoke from the Soufriere’s volcanic top. Everything in between is a perfectly balanced mixture of colour, tradition, and a lifestyle to die for.Guadeloupe: Caribbean Blues takes us on a trip to this dreamy destination. Rhythm and music go hand in hand in the Caribbean as different styles combine forming unique masterpieces that have us all dancing in no time. Get ready to dance to the sound of music, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Ocean Safari - South Africa - Episode 4
programme.desc: Andi van Zyl is back to Cape Town to meet up with two board riders. Tammy Robarts has just returned from the ISA World Surfing Games where she represented South Africa in stand up Paddleboarding. The winds in Cape Town have picked up and its time to meet with Luke Mc Gillewie, South Africa's top kite surfer.

programme.title: Ocean Safari - South Africa - Episode 5
programme.desc: Andi van Zyl is discovering and experiencing the coastline of South Africa through some of its remarkable personalities and their human spirit.

programme.desc: Small city of Vrboska is a little piece of paradise for yachtsmen and Split is the biggest city in Dalmatia. We will show you where to go, what to see, and of course, some amazing food suggestions.

programme.title: Surfer's Blood
programme.desc: Renowned surf photographer and filmmaker Patrick Trefz explores the essence of the sport he loves by profiling those who inspire him. Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 3 World Cup Tacen
programme.desc: We are in stage three of the Canoe Slalom World Cup, and this time we will be competing on the water of Ljubljana, in Tacen. The racing conditions are perfect and we are focused on the final: men will be competing in C1 and women in K1. Matej Benus who was leading the standings in the men's category will not be competing in the final, so Benjamin Savsek has a chance to step up in the podium. Relive the best moments of the third stage of the 2018 Canoe Slalom World Cup in Tacen.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 4 World Cup Markkleeberg

This is the third time this venue hosts a World Cup, and 183 athletes from 26 countries have enrolled, competing for points across the five-race World Cup. As we are a month away from the olympic qualifiers and World Championships in Spain, we are ready for a sharp end of the 2019 international racing season. Discover the best moments in Markkleeberg on Nautical Channel!

programme.title: H2O Racing: F1H2O World Championship - Episode 3 - GP of Vietnam - Binh Dinh
programme.desc: H2O Racing: F1H2O World Championship - Episode 3 - GP of Vietnam - Binh Dinh

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 2 Portimao, Portugal
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship Oﬀshore has started its new season in the European City of Sport for 2019, Portimao, Portugal. It attracts the world’s top male and female riders from around the globe who compete on cutting edge equipment, delivering a mix of fast paced racing, nail biting action and non-stop excitement. More than 70 riders from 26 countries will battle in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2.In this episode, we will focus on all the ski action from the Grand Prix of Portugal.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 3
programme.desc: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 3

programme.title: Bol D'Or: The Swiss Do It Better
programme.desc: The Bol D’Or Mirabaud is the most important inland lake regatta in the world. Taking place in Switzerland, a landlocked nation that sits on top of the sailing world with multiple successes whether in the Olympic, Offshore or in Grand Prix Racing formats, and champion of two America’s Cup victories. The race started in 1939 and it is a symbolic race that brings together the best of Switzerland’s sailing tradition.Every year they welcome mono-hulls and multihulls on Lake Geneva, starting in the city of Geneva. More than 500 boats fight each other on this 123 kilometre (66.5 nautical miles) course from Geneva to Le Bouveret and back. It is a national treasure that every summer gathers thousands of spectators to the shores of Lake Geneva and really shows how the Swiss indeed do it better.Watch the race and become one with the beauty of Switzerland’s background, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Ep.4 - Maxi Yacht Rolex Cup
programme.desc: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Ep.4 - Maxi Yacht Rolex Cup

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 4
programme.desc: Emirates Team New Zealand follows the script and gets the pass to take on the Defender for the 35th America's Cup Match. 100% fly-time, 40 knot match races, close scalls, close contact, a helmsmen going overboard... we will take an in depth look at safety in a modern day America's Cup. Then on exclusive: Franck Cammas encounters a rudder blade and we dive into the body gear for the AC50 crews with Thierry Fouchier.

programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 3
programme.desc: Chef Nikolaos is giving us a well-needed cooking lesson before jumping on board to prepare the recipe he has in store for us. He will also take the time to teach us how to find out whether if a fish is fresh or not before we go on and try the dish with the people from the port. Then, we are meeting with the young Chef Jason, who with only 19 years is the main chef at a 4-star hotel. He is cooking on board our boat, and we are excited to try out his dish.

programme.title: Flavours of Venice - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode, Andi takes us on a journey around the streets of Venice, the sinking city. We will discover unique stores that are sank underwater and learn more about the history and elements of the famous gondola. Then, we will be visiting the Ristorante Riviera by the hand of the Chef Cremonini and asking him to join us onboard to enjoy a delicious meal. Come join us!

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: The glamorous city of Cannes hosts the luxury Yachting Festival par excellence for the 40th time this year and a new Luxury Gallery has been opened in the Palais de Festivals to celebrate this landmark anniversary. Breathe in the boat show’s opulence and learn about the latest trends in the yachting world!

programme.title: Guadeloupe: Caribbean Blues
programme.desc: A visit to Guadeloupe is like visiting all corners of our world’s beauty. Looking to the left you can catch a breeze that swifts a kite surfer in the air, and to the right a gust of smoke from the Soufriere’s volcanic top. Everything in between is a perfectly balanced mixture of colour, tradition, and a lifestyle to die for.Guadeloupe: Caribbean Blues takes us on a trip to this dreamy destination. Rhythm and music go hand in hand in the Caribbean as different styles combine forming unique masterpieces that have us all dancing in no time. Get ready to dance to the sound of music, on Nautical Channel.

Matej Benus who was leading the standings in the men's category will not be competing in the final, so Benjamin Savsek has a chance to step up in the podium. Relive the best moments of the third stage of the 2018 Canoe Slalom World Cup in Tacen.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 4 World Cup Markkleeberg
programme.desc: We are in Markkleeberg, Germany, for round four of the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup. As we are a month away from the olympic qualifiers and World Championships in Spain, we are ready for a sharp end of the 2019 international racing season. programme.title: Surfer's Blood

Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Escape to Zanzibar - Episode 1
programme.desc: As soon as we arrive on the island, we begin to explore Zanzibar starting in the northern part of the country. Nungwi, our chosen location is a common touristic destination and its guests are famously welcoming. Let's begin our journey by visiting the famous sea turtle conservation and protection center. Buckle up for this adventure!

programme.title: Escape to Zanzibar - Episode 2
programme.desc: We begin this day of discoveries with a visit to the most important historical landmarks in Stone Town. For lunch, we head straight on to The Rock: one of Zanzibar's greatest icons. The restaurant was literally built on a rock and can only be reached on foot during the low tide. Then, we will follow Shabed's suggestion and dive into the water to try all the activities available.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 4 - Zagreb
programme.desc: The capital of Croatia Zagreb is a not-to-miss destination, no matter if you arrive by boat, car or airplane. Only 1 hour from the coast it is definitely worth a visit. Most important attractions and some crazy museums will amaze you. There is also an interesting connection between Zagreb and nautics and we will reveal it all to you.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 5 - Solta – Sibenik
programme.desc: The island of Solta is one of the most beautiful islands in the Central Dalmatia and we visited some very interesting places and coves. Sibenik is a city with many fortresses, old churches and UNESCO heritage. See it all in this episode.

programme.title: Salon Nautique Paris - 2015
programme.desc: Among the world's greatest boat shows, Salon Nautique in Paris is back! Join Nico Peduzzi at the prestigious Port de Versailles and discover this year's hottest innovations in sailing, motorboats, board sports, equipment, tourism and more.

programme.title: Salon Nautique Paris - 2016
programme.desc: By the industry and the financial world as a whole it's considered one of the most important venues in the field. For the passionate French public it's an absolute must to prepare for next year's season on the water. There's just no other place like the Paris Nautic, because France is possibly the greatest boating nation on the planet. Expected in the thousands starting on Saturday December the third until the following weekend, fans will be storming the pavillions of Porte de Versailles looking for the latest innovations and the best possible deal.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 5
programme.desc: From big and energetic cities to beautiful small villages, Quebec has it all. A stunning coastline and amazing food, but more than anything else, pristine wilderness. The Saguenay-Lac-Saint-Jean region boasts three national parks and a dramatic Saguenay Fjord. This time, Ken Whiting will tackle one of Eastern Canada's most popular whitewater rivers.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 6
programme.desc: Montreal is a historic and multicultural place that pulses with energy. What makes it particularly amazing is that it also provides easy access to outdoor activities and world-class paddling opportunities, both inside and outside city limits. The Eastern Townships are known for their charming villages, incredible food and beautiful waterways. This week we are exploring them and Montreal.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 5 World Cup Final Prague
programme.desc: Welcome to Prague in the Czech Republic for the final of the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup. The five-race series culminates over the course of this weekend with double points up for grabs to determine who will be crowned the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup winner. 244 athletes will be racing this weekend from 36 countries on the course on the Vltava River. Let's dive into the action of this final event in Prague!

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom World Championship La Seu d'Urgell
programme.desc: In this episode we are in La Seu D'Urgell, in the Spanish Pyrenees, for the 2019 International Canoe Slalom World Championships. We started off with athletes from 63 nations competing for the title. Now, 8 nations remain in this 10-boat final in La Seu d'Urgell. Discover the most breath-taking moments of the 2019 event in Spain!

programme.desc: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Ep.4 - Maxi Yacht Rolex Cup

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 4
programme.desc: Emirates Team New Zealand follows the script and gets the pass to take on the Defender for the 35th America's Cup Match. 100% fly-time, 40 knot match races, close scalls, close contact, a helmsmen going overboard... we will take an in depth look at safety in a modern day America's Cup. Then on exclusive: Franck Cammas encounters a rudder blade and we dive into the body gear for the AC50 crews with Thierry Fouchier.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 5 World Cup Final Prague
programme.desc: Welcome to Prague in the Czech Republic for the final of the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup. The five-race series culminates over the course of this weekend with double points up for grabs to determine who will be crowned the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup winner. 244 athletes will be racing this weekend from 36 countries on the course on the Vltava River. Let's dive into the action of this final event in Prague!

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom World Championship La Seu d'Urgell
programme.desc: In this episode we are in La Seu D'Urgell, in the Spanish Pyrenees, for the 2019 International Canoe Slalom World Championships. We started off with athletes from 63 nations competing for the title. Now, 8 nations remain in this 10-boat final in La Seu d'Urgell. Discover the most breath-taking moments of the 2019 event in Spain!

programme.title: H2O Racing: F1H2O World Championship - Episode 3 - GP of Vietnam - Binh Dinh
programme.desc: H2O Racing: F1H2O World Championship - Episode 3 - GP of Vietnam - Binh Dinh

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 2 Portimao, Portugal
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship Oﬀshore has started its new season in the European City of Sport for 2019, Portimao, Portugal. It attracts the world’s top male and female riders from around the globe who compete on cutting edge equipment, delivering a mix of fast paced racing, nail biting action and non-stop excitement. More than 70 riders from 26 countries will battle in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2.In this episode, we will focus on all the ski action from the Grand Prix of Portugal.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 3
programme.desc: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 3

programme.title: Bol D'Or: The Swiss Do It Better
programme.desc: The Bol D’Or Mirabaud is the most important inland lake regatta in the world. Taking place in Switzerland, a landlocked nation that sits on top of the sailing world with multiple successes whether in the Olympic, Offshore or in Grand Prix Racing formats, and champion of two America’s Cup victories. The race started in 1939 and it is a symbolic race that brings together the best of Switzerland’s sailing tradition.Every year they welcome mono-hulls and multihulls on Lake Geneva, starting in the city of Geneva. More than 500 boats fight each other on this 123 kilometre (66.5 nautical miles) course from Geneva to Le Bouveret and back. It is a national treasure that every summer gathers thousands of spectators to the shores of Lake Geneva and really shows how the Swiss indeed do it better.Watch the race and become one with the beauty of Switzerland’s background, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 4 - Zagreb
programme.desc: The capital of Croatia Zagreb is a not-to-miss destination, no matter if you arrive by boat, car or airplane. Only 1 hour from the coast it is definitely worth a visit. Most important attractions and some crazy museums will amaze you. There is also an interesting connection between Zagreb and nautics and we will reveal it all to you.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 5 - Solta – Sibenik
programme.desc: The island of Solta is one of the most beautiful islands in the Central Dalmatia and we visited some very interesting places and coves. Sibenik is a city with many fortresses, old churches and UNESCO heritage. See it all in this episode.

programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 3
programme.desc: Chef Nikolaos is giving us a well-needed cooking lesson before jumping on board to prepare the recipe he has in store for us. He will also take the time to teach us how to find out whether if a fish is fresh or not before we go on and try the dish with the people from the port. Then, we are meeting with the young Chef Jason, who with only 19 years is the main chef at a 4-star hotel. He is cooking on board our boat, and we are excited to try out his dish.

programme.title: Flavours of Venice - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode, Andi takes us on a journey around the streets of Venice, the sinking city. We will discover unique stores that are sank underwater and learn more about the history and elements of the famous gondola. Then, we will be visiting the Ristorante Riviera by the hand of the Chef Cremonini and asking him to join us onboard to enjoy a delicious meal. Come join us!

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 5
programme.desc: Kite Masters - Episode 5

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 6
programme.desc: Kite Masters - Episode 6

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: The glamorous city of Cannes hosts the luxury Yachting Festival par excellence for the 40th time this year and a new Luxury Gallery has been opened in the Palais de Festivals to celebrate this landmark anniversary. Breathe in the boat show’s opulence and learn about the latest trends in the yachting world!

programme.title: Guadeloupe: Caribbean Blues
programme.desc: A visit to Guadeloupe is like visiting all corners of our world’s beauty. Looking to the left you can catch a breeze that swifts a kite surfer in the air, and to the right a gust of smoke from the Soufriere’s volcanic top. Everything in between is a perfectly balanced mixture of colour, tradition, and a lifestyle to die for.Guadeloupe: Caribbean Blues takes us on a trip to this dreamy destination. Rhythm and music go hand in hand in the Caribbean as different styles combine forming unique masterpieces that have us all dancing in no time. Get ready to dance to the sound of music, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 1 - Nelson Mandela Pro
programme.desc: The first event of the South African WQS during series kicks off in Nelson Mandela Bay. Don’t miss all the action, the disappointments and victories at the start of what will be an epic African series.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 2 - Port Alfred Classic
programme.desc: Welcome to the second event of the South Africa WQS Surf Series. This time, we are in Port Alfred at The Royal St Andrews Hotel Port Alfred Classic. Some of South Africa's best waves can be surfed here despite also being one of the most underrated locations. We are in for a thrill!

programme.title: Skagerrak
programme.desc: SKAGERRAK follows the preparation and mental development of the Danish professional stand up paddle athlete Casper Steinfath in his attempt to be the first person in the world to paddle from Denmark to Norway.In his journey, brotherhood and friendship come to play an essential part making a dream and project like the crossing of an entire ocean come true. SKAGERRAK will take you behind the scenes of mainstream media and portrays the Northern and secluded region of Denmark called Thy, where Casper grew up.A region, where a pioneer spirit and desire for independence prevails despite adversity and isolation. SKAGERRAK is an inspirational story that touches upon the dreams, aspirations, and desires that live inside all of us. A film about the courage to reach for the horizon.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 2bis Freestyle Portimao, Portugal
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship Oﬀshore event has kicked the 2019 season in the European City of Sport for 2019, Portimao, Portugal. More than 70 riders from 26 countries will battle in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2. In this episode, we will focus on the Runabout GP1 and Freestyle action from the Grand Prix of Portugal. Come join us!

programme.title: Karujet 2017
programme.desc: The much awaited 20th edition of the Karujet has finally roared through the island of Guadeloupe. With the world's top guns of Jet Ski racing on the pitch, these daredevils ploughed through waves at speeds of up to 80 knots. Competition is rough as some participants break down and return to the beach with broken bones, others just give up, while the remaining brave riders fight to the end!The event takes place in no other than the festive and colorful Caribbean island, Guadeloupe. To bring this event to life, people from all over the world join to create what is becoming the biggest nautical event for Jet Ski lovers of the year.As competitors speed across the ocean, firm land spectators await in an exciting celebration. Who will become this year’s champion? Join Nautical channel as we follow the 20th edition of what might be the last Karujet.

programme.title: P1 USA SHOOTOUT - Lake of the Ozarks - Part Two
programme.desc: P1 USA SHOOTOUT - Lake of the Ozarks - Part Two

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: The glamorous city of Cannes hosts the luxury Yachting Festival par excellence for the 40th time this year and a new Luxury Gallery has been opened in the Palais de Festivals to celebrate this landmark anniversary. Breathe in the boat show’s opulence and learn about the latest trends in the yachting world!

programme.title: Guadeloupe: Caribbean Blues
programme.desc: A visit to Guadeloupe is like visiting all corners of our world’s beauty. Looking to the left you can catch a breeze that swifts a kite surfer in the air, and to the right a gust of smoke from the Soufriere’s volcanic top. Everything in between is a perfectly balanced mixture of colour, tradition, and a lifestyle to die for.Guadeloupe: Caribbean Blues takes us on a trip to this dreamy destination. Rhythm and music go hand in hand in the Caribbean as different styles combine forming unique masterpieces that have us all dancing in no time. Get ready to dance to the sound of music, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Surfer's Blood
programme.desc: Renowned surf photographer and filmmaker Patrick Trefz explores the essence of the sport he loves by profiling those who inspire him. Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 4 - Zagreb
programme.desc: The capital of Croatia Zagreb is a not-to-miss destination, no matter if you arrive by boat, car or airplane. Only 1 hour from the coast it is definitely worth a visit. Most important attractions and some crazy museums will amaze you. There is also an interesting connection between Zagreb and nautics and we will reveal it all to you.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 5 - Solta – Sibenik
programme.desc: The island of Solta is one of the most beautiful islands in the Central Dalmatia and we visited some very interesting places and coves. Sibenik is a city with many fortresses, old churches and UNESCO heritage. See it all in this episode.

programme.title: Skagerrak
programme.desc: SKAGERRAK follows the preparation and mental development of the Danish professional stand up paddle athlete Casper Steinfath in his attempt to be the first person in the world to paddle from Denmark to Norway.In his journey, brotherhood and friendship come to play an essential part making a dream and project like the crossing of an entire ocean come true. SKAGERRAK will take you behind the scenes of mainstream media and portrays the Northern and secluded region of Denmark called Thy, where Casper grew up.A region, where a pioneer spirit and desire for independence prevails despite adversity and isolation. SKAGERRAK is an inspirational story that touches upon the dreams, aspirations, and desires that live inside all of us. A film about the courage to reach for the horizon.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 2bis Freestyle Portimao, Portugal
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship Oﬀshore event has kicked the 2019 season in the European City of Sport for 2019, Portimao, Portugal. More than 70 riders from 26 countries will battle in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2. In this episode, we will focus on the Runabout GP1 and Freestyle action from the Grand Prix of Portugal. Come join us!

programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 3
programme.desc: Chef Nikolaos is giving us a well-needed cooking lesson before jumping on board to prepare the recipe he has in store for us. He will also take the time to teach us how to find out whether if a fish is fresh or not before we go on and try the dish with the people from the port. Then, we are meeting with the young Chef Jason, who with only 19 years is the main chef at a 4-star hotel. He is cooking on board our boat, and we are excited to try out his dish.

programme.title: Flavours of Venice - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode, Andi takes us on a journey around the streets of Venice, the sinking city. We will discover unique stores that are sank underwater and learn more about the history and elements of the famous gondola. Then, we will be visiting the Ristorante Riviera by the hand of the Chef Cremonini and asking him to join us onboard to enjoy a delicious meal. Come join us!

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Ep.4 - Maxi Yacht Rolex Cup
programme.desc: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Ep.4 - Maxi Yacht Rolex Cup

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 4
programme.desc: Emirates Team New Zealand follows the script and gets the pass to take on the Defender for the 35th America's Cup Match. 100% fly-time, 40 knot match races, close scalls, close contact, a helmsmen going overboard... we will take an in depth look at safety in a modern day America's Cup. Then on exclusive: Franck Cammas encounters a rudder blade and we dive into the body gear for the AC50 crews with Thierry Fouchier.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 5 World Cup Final Prague
programme.desc: Welcome to Prague in the Czech Republic for the final of the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup. The five-race series culminates over the course of this weekend with double points up for grabs to determine who will be crowned the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup winner. 244 athletes will be racing this weekend from 36 countries on the course on the Vltava River. Let's dive into the action of this final event in Prague!

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom World Championship La Seu d'Urgell
programme.desc: In this episode we are in La Seu D'Urgell, in the Spanish Pyrenees, for the 2019 International Canoe Slalom World Championships. We started off with athletes from 63 nations competing for the title. Now, 8 nations remain in this 10-boat final in La Seu d'Urgell. Discover the most breath-taking moments of the 2019 event in Spain!

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 3
programme.desc: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 3

programme.title: Bol D'Or: The Swiss Do It Better
programme.desc: The Bol D’Or Mirabaud is the most important inland lake regatta in the world. Taking place in Switzerland, a landlocked nation that sits on top of the sailing world with multiple successes whether in the Olympic, Offshore or in Grand Prix Racing formats, and champion of two America’s Cup victories. The race started in 1939 and it is a symbolic race that brings together the best of Switzerland’s sailing tradition.Every year they welcome mono-hulls and multihulls on Lake Geneva, starting in the city of Geneva. More than 500 boats fight each other on this 123 kilometre (66.5 nautical miles) course from Geneva to Le Bouveret and back. It is a national treasure that every summer gathers thousands of spectators to the shores of Lake Geneva and really shows how the Swiss indeed do it better.Watch the race and become one with the beauty of Switzerland’s background, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Alien Trespass
programme.desc: A spaceship crash in 1957 California leads to the escape of the Ghota, a murderous monster bent on destroying all life forms. In order to capture the Ghota, a benevolent alien named Urp takes over the body of an astronomer (Eric McCormack) and enlists the aid of a waitress named Tammy (Jenni Baird). But, unless Urp and Tammy are successful, mankind is doomed.

After the couple wed, Vicki's fame continues to grow, but Norman descends into alcoholism, and she must decide between pursuing her dream and caring for him.

programme.title: A Toda Luz
programme.desc: ¿Te hace falta ánimo o quieres crecer en tu fe junto a otros? A Toda Luz es un programa lleno de vida, con conversaciones reales, risas, y verdades que inspiran. Con voces dinámicas y temas relevantes, te anima, te conecta y te acerca más a Dios. - ¿Te falta ánimo o quieres crecer en tu fe? A Toda Luz te ofrece risas, verdad y esperanza con voces dinámicas y temas que te inspiran y te acercan a Dios.

programme.title: Ghost Stories 1: Walking With the dead
programme.desc: Walking with the Dead examines some of the most haunted places in the state of Indiana. See evidence of unexplainable paranormal events like visits from turn-of-the-century celebrities at Tuckaway House, appearances of Lady Rivoli at the Rivoli Theater and the angry energy of past prisoners at Hartford City Jail.

programme.title: I'm Ringo
programme.desc: Argentine Boxer Oscar Bonavena, popularly known as Ringo because of his Beatle haircut was murdered at the age of 33 at the gates of a legendary Mustang brothel in Nevada. He fought Muhammad Ali in 1970, and was a top heavyweight contender through much of the 1960's. It still unknown the full reasons why Bonavena was killed but he was employed as a bouncer at the Mustang Ranch at the time and Bonavena became involved with the owner of ranch Joe Conforte's wife Sally Burgess, 26 years Bonavena's senior and had bragged about taking over the Mustang Ranch. After being banded from the ranch by Conforte he dared to return. The guards had orders to shoot Bonavena if he showed up but after a confrontation at the gate Bonavena was shot and killed by the guard. Originally charged with murder, the guard pleaded guilty to voluntary manslaughter and served only 15 months in prison but the owner of the ranch was never charged.

programme.title: Running Against Dick
programme.desc: Trials and tribulations of a third party candidate as he struggles to keep his mind and campaign straight running for congress against Dick Gephardt.

programme.title: Spooks Hoods And JFK
programme.desc: Confessions of the JFK murder

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: With aerial footage from fifty-four countries, 'Home' is a depiction of how Earth's problems are all interlinked.

programme.title: The Basement
programme.desc: Artist and Playwright Darrell Fusaro returns home to Clifton, New Jersey to face demons cast by the brutal 1970 mafia-style slaying of his beloved Grandfather, Union Official James Fusaro.

programme.title: The Viking Maid
programme.desc: Despite record salmon runs in the state of Alaska, wild Salmon fishermen struggle to stay afloat in the flooded salmon markets of the world. This documentary is a journey aboard an Alaskan salmon seining vessel, exploring the lifestyle and adventure of a dying breed of men, the last of hunters and gatherers who dare to take on mother nature to earn a living. Journey aboard the Viking Maid, atop the erratic seas of Southeast Alaska, and find out why you should always ask, "is this salmon farmed or wild?"

programme.title: Not Another Black Movie
programme.desc:
Not Another Black Movie stars Damon Williams (Bad Boys of Comedy, Comic View, BET LIVE, The Tom Joyner Morning Show), Janet Hubert (The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air), Rodney Perry (The Monique Show, Who's Got Jokes) Jay Davis (Not Another Zombie Movie, Shots Fired), and Leon Rogers (WGCI, Comic View, Bad Boys of Comedy).
Not Another Black Movie is not only a spoof of a genre often associated with Tyler Perry films, but a satirical look at family dysfunction as well. Written by Jay Davis and Directed by Donte "Diesel" Williams, Not Another Black Movie addresses issues that effect many families whether they be rich or poor, black or white. Although we poke fun at some of the stereotypical roles portrayed in this genre, we hope to shed some light on problems that plague many families while giving you a good laugh.

programme.title: Not Another Black Movie
programme.desc:
Not Another Black Movie stars Damon Williams (Bad Boys of Comedy, Comic View, BET LIVE, The Tom Joyner Morning Show), Janet Hubert (The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air), Rodney Perry (The Monique Show, Who's Got Jokes) Jay Davis (Not Another Zombie Movie, Shots Fired), and Leon Rogers (WGCI, Comic View, Bad Boys of Comedy).
Not Another Black Movie is not only a spoof of a genre often associated with Tyler Perry films, but a satirical look at family dysfunction as well. Written by Jay Davis and Directed by Donte "Diesel" Williams, Not Another Black Movie addresses issues that effect many families whether they be rich or poor, black or white. Although we poke fun at some of the stereotypical roles portrayed in this genre, we hope to shed some light on problems that plague many families while giving you a good laugh.

programme.title: Buffalo Gun
programme.desc: The Indians claim that their government rations are being stolen and they threaten to fight back

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Cartwrights come to the aid of a Chinese-American stable hand accused of murder. Opposing them is a manipulative mayoral candidate who wants all "foreigners" to leave Virginia City

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss and Little Joe are mistaken for bloodthirsty hired killers in a small Texas town dominated by two feuding families

programme.title: Guns of Diablo
programme.desc: Wagon train scout Linc Murdock reminisces about his old feud with a rancher

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: After a U.S. deputy marshal apparently saves Adam's life by gunning down two men who shot at him.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Dolly runs away with her boyfriend

programme.title: The Shooting
programme.desc: A mysterious woman persuades two cowboys to help her in a revenge scheme

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Inspector Leduque comes from New Orleans to Virginia City to take Ben Cartwright back for a 20-year-old murder

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss falls prey to the wiles of a beautiful woman with a gambling addiction

programme.title: Vengenace Valley
programme.desc: The sons of a Colorado cattle baron, one biological and the other adopted, resent one another and fight for control of their father's cattle empire

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Jennifer Beale is abducted in the hopes her rich father, Joshua, the richest silver baron on the Comstock, will pay a $1M ransom. The plan unravels when the beautiful Della is killed and Hercules, who loves her, finds out who did it.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Jeb Drummond is a murderous sheep herder that has Adam taken hostage to try and force Ben to sign over a large section of Ponderosa land to him

programme.title: Kentucky Rifle
programme.desc: While the wagon train forges ahead, a few people stay behind to repair a disabled rifle-filled wagon but they have to contend with one another's ego and with aggressive Comanches who demand the rifles as payment for safe passage

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Gunnar is a long-lost relative of the Cartwright family. When Gunnar arrives at the Ponderosa, the family takes him in for the evening. Gunnar is the brother to one of Ben Cartwright's late wives. Unbeknownst to the Cartwright family, Gunnar is also the leader of a band of criminals called The Comancheros. Little Joe is visiting his girlfriend away from the ranch. When Little Joe and his girlfriend are kidnapped by The Comancheros, the Cartwrights and Gunnar are forced into a difficult situation

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Cartwrights' neighbor Tom Edwards has lived as a paraplegic, ever since an accident involving Ben Cartwright and a gun. His ranch is going to waste. His wife Joyce is a longtime friend of Ben, and Ben decides to help the Edwards couple by making Tom a business proposition:

programme.title: Today’s Wild West
programme.desc: On the doorstep of Yellowstone Park, ride the appaloosa horses of the Nine Quarter Circle Ranch; Montana’s Western Woodstock - the Red Ants Pants Music Festival; Making buffalo coats at Merlin’s Hide Out in Wyoming; plus the Montana target shooting match inspired by a Tom Selleck Western.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss mentors a lonely, mentally challenged man who, with superhuman size and strength, becomes extremely dangerous when angered

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: About to set out on a cattle drive, Ben hires a young drifter named Sam Jackson as one of his drovers. What he doesn't know is that Jackson is really outlaw Johnny Logan, who signed on to the drive because he knew it was going to pass near the town of Waycross, and Logan is determined to kill the Waycross sheriff--who is his father.

programme.title: Today’s Wild West
programme.desc: Ride in the shadow of the Sierras at California’s historic Hunewill Ranch; roll through California’s gold country with the Days of 49 wagon train; and meet the Western artisans of Ricotti Saddle Company.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Jacob Darien is leading his family of Quakers through Virginia City

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Her husband is in prison, and the sheriff needs someone to look after the boy until the boy's uncle can come to claim him. The Cartwrights begin to take care of the boy at the Ponderosa. When the boy arrives at the ranch, he does not know that his father is in prison

programme.title: Today’s Wild West
programme.desc: Today’s Wild West takes you to Montana for an eight day horseback immersion into the life of a U.S. Cavalry soldier, at the site of the Battle of the Little Bighorn.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: An outlaw gang robs Virginia City's bank and makes off with almost all of its money

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Prejudice erupts on both sides!

programme.title: Today’s Wild West
programme.desc: You’ll have a horseback view of one the greatest adventures in Today’s Wild West, as we drive a herd of 500 horses for two days over sixty grueling miles, outside Craig, Colorado.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: In the far reaches of space, a small crew, 20 years into their solitary mission, find things beginning to go hilariously wrong

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When a powerful gang plagues Virginia City with a murderous protection racket, the Cartwrights are determined to stop it even as it threatens them

programme.title: Today’s Wild West
programme.desc: New Mexico’s Chuckwagon Trail Ride; the horseback lessons of life at California’s Rawhide Ranch summer camp for kids; and the unique batiks of Montana artist Echo Ukrainetz.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: He wants to sell their land for mining operations which will spoil the water rights agreement that Andy and Ben made years ago

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Cartwrights try to disprove the validity of a Spanish land grant to stop the De La Cuesta family from seizinglands

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Charlie Trent used to be an Army scout. Now he's the town drunk. Hoss helps him regain his self-esteem when he has him volunteer to lead a gold-bearing troop through the desert where there's very little water.

programme.title: Today’s Wild West
programme.desc: Arizona’s historic Rancho de la Osa; Montana’s award-winning Crow Indian artist Birdy Real Bird; Plus Cowboy music and much more at California’s Santa Clarita Cowboy Festival.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: An English couple comes to Ponderosa on vacation

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: While in San Francisco, two of Ben's hired hands get shanghaied and so does Ben in the process of looking for them

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Joe kills a man in self-defense
