programme.title: Meditation Now - Sharpen the Mind
programme.desc: Find a comfortable seat, close your eyes and imagine yourself sitting in the warm sand on a beautiful beach as you join Kino for today’s meditation. Sharpen the edge of the mind as you bring your awareness to a single point of focus.

programme.title: Meditation Now - Release Judgment
programme.desc: Join Kino for a seaside meditation along the shores of the beautiful, Tulum, Mexico. Quite the mind and release all judgement so you can rest in the blissful awareness of all that is.

programme.title: Yoga Nidra for Relaxation
programme.desc: Join Irene for a yoga nidra that is designed to promote deeper sleep and relaxation.

programme.title: Yoga Is Trailer
programme.desc: Yoga Is Trailer

programme.title: Yoga Is Home
programme.desc: For today's class, Kino invites you to come home... We’ll use the seated pose Padmasana to explore what it means to be happy, peaceful and spiritually at home in your own skin.

programme.title: Plant-based Cooking, Vegan Culture & Healthy Eating with Alexa Soto
programme.desc: Plant based food blogger and recipe developer Alexa Soto joins Kino on today’s episode of Seek Up!

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Breakfast for Your Dosha
programme.desc: Today you are going to learn how to start your day in the most effective way according to Ayurveda. Find out why it’s important to have a nourishing breakfast that’s designed for your specific mind-body type. Plus, this episode offers three Smoothie Bowl recipes – one for each of the doshas – that will nourish your body and set the tone for a great day. Less than 40 minutes. Complete Recipes Here - https://bit.ly/2xUOMEQ

programme.title: Yoga for Inflexible People - Try Your Triangle – Triangle Pose
programme.desc: Try out the triangle pose! Today's class will explore this foundational asana through both chair and mat based variations. Under Kino's expert guidance you will get comfortable with the physical practice and start to feel a deep, intentional gratitude too!

programme.title: Get Your Yoga On Trailer
programme.desc: Get Your Yoga On Trailer

programme.title: Plank
programme.desc: Join Kino for one of her favorite daily yoga drills, plank! Kino takes you through a quick warm up before diving into the challenging world of plank pose. Get ready to tone your core and strengthen your shoulders!

programme.title: Shalabhasana
programme.desc: A flow that thoroughly warms up the spine and builds up to the laying backbend called Shalabhasana.

programme.title: Global Yogi Trailer
programme.desc: Global Yogi Trailer

programme.title: Kino in Budapest
programme.desc: One of Kino’s favorite hobbies is learning how to say ‘Thank You’ in different languages. In this episode of Global Yoga, she's learning that special phrase in Hungarian, as she travels to Budapest. Travel to St Stephen's cathedral, one of the biggest structures in the country, stroll the Danube River and visit Heroes Square, a World Heritage Site. Join Kino as she explores the rich history of this ancient country while on her journey of sharing yoga with the world.

programme.title: Upward Facing Dog
programme.desc: A restorative flow that stretches and warms the body with a prop assisted sequence. This class has a focus on the fundamental pose Upward Facing Dog.

programme.title: Downward Facing Dog
programme.desc: Dive into the fundamentals of yoga with this sequence that builds up to downward facing dog.

programme.title: Yoga Is Mindfulness
programme.desc: Today we go deeper into understanding what yoga is as we explore mindfulness and the pose Trikonasana. Join Kino as she guides you through a physical practice with a focus on remaining present and judgement free. Use triangle pose as an opportunity to be present with and accepting towards whatever arises in the body and mind as you practice.

programme.title: Hips - Love
programme.desc: The journey of awakening the hips is very much a journey of self-love and self-discovery. Join Kino for a 30-minute practice that’s all about learning to love your hips. Avoid the temptation to judge and manipulate or force your flexibility by training the mind to be present amidst what may be the murky territory of the inner body around the hips.

programme.title: Yoga Nidra for Chakra Balancing
programme.desc: Join Irene for a yoga nidra that’s designed to promote Chakra balancing.

programme.title: Shalabhasana
programme.desc: A flow that thoroughly warms up the spine and builds up to the laying backbend called Shalabhasana.

programme.title: Global Yogi Trailer
programme.desc: Global Yogi Trailer

programme.title: Kino in Budapest
programme.desc: One of Kino’s favorite hobbies is learning how to say ‘Thank You’ in different languages. In this episode of Global Yoga, she's learning that special phrase in Hungarian, as she travels to Budapest. Travel to St Stephen's cathedral, one of the biggest structures in the country, stroll the Danube River and visit Heroes Square, a World Heritage Site. Join Kino as she explores the rich history of this ancient country while on her journey of sharing yoga with the world.

programme.title: Upward Facing Dog
programme.desc: A restorative flow that stretches and warms the body with a prop assisted sequence. This class has a focus on the fundamental pose Upward Facing Dog.

programme.title: Downward Facing Dog
programme.desc: Dive into the fundamentals of yoga with this sequence that builds up to downward facing dog.

programme.title: Yoga Is Mindfulness
programme.desc: Today we go deeper into understanding what yoga is as we explore mindfulness and the pose Trikonasana. Join Kino as she guides you through a physical practice with a focus on remaining present and judgement free. Use triangle pose as an opportunity to be present with and accepting towards whatever arises in the body and mind as you practice.

programme.title: Hips - Love
programme.desc: The journey of awakening the hips is very much a journey of self-love and self-discovery. Join Kino for a 30-minute practice that’s all about learning to love your hips. Avoid the temptation to judge and manipulate or force your flexibility by training the mind to be present amidst what may be the murky territory of the inner body around the hips.

programme.title: Yoga Nidra for Chakra Balancing
programme.desc: Join Irene for a yoga nidra that’s designed to promote Chakra balancing.

programme.title: Meditations for Manifestation Trailer
programme.desc: Meditations for Manifestation Trailer

programme.title: Meditation Now - Sharpen the Mind
programme.desc: Find a comfortable seat, close your eyes and imagine yourself sitting in the warm sand on a beautiful beach as you join Kino for today’s meditation. Sharpen the edge of the mind as you bring your awareness to a single point of focus.

programme.title: Meditation Now - Release Judgment
programme.desc: Join Kino for a seaside meditation along the shores of the beautiful, Tulum, Mexico. Quite the mind and release all judgement so you can rest in the blissful awareness of all that is.

programme.title: Yoga Nidra for Relaxation
programme.desc: Join Irene for a yoga nidra that is designed to promote deeper sleep and relaxation.

programme.title: Yoga Is Trailer

programme.title: Yoga Is Home
programme.desc: For today's class, Kino invites you to come home... We’ll use the seated pose Padmasana to explore what it means to be happy, peaceful and spiritually at home in your own skin.

programme.title: Plant-based Cooking, Vegan Culture & Healthy Eating with Alexa Soto
programme.desc: Plant based food blogger and recipe developer Alexa Soto joins Kino on today’s episode of Seek Up!

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Breakfast for Your Dosha
programme.desc: Today you are going to learn how to start your day in the most effective way according to Ayurveda. Find out why it’s important to have a nourishing breakfast that’s designed for your specific mind-body type. Plus, this episode offers three Smoothie Bowl recipes – one for each of the doshas – that will nourish your body and set the tone for a great day. Less than 40 minutes. Complete Recipes Here - https://bit.ly/2xUOMEQ

programme.title: Yoga for Inflexible People - Try Your Triangle – Triangle Pose
programme.desc: Try out the triangle pose! Today's class will explore this foundational asana through both chair and mat based variations. Under Kino's expert guidance you will get comfortable with the physical practice and start to feel a deep, intentional gratitude too!

programme.title: Yoga Is Commitment
programme.desc: This class centers around commitment, so Kino is asking you start by going all in. The intention here is to get you on your mat every day, even if you don’t make it through the whole class, so that you can cultivate greater awareness of your body and mind. In this class we’ll build up to a steady, well constructed Down Dog by focusing on the shoulders in a series of preparatory postures. Flow through child's pose, table top, puppy pose and sun salutations as you create healthy patterns of movement and breath control. The commitment you make to the practice is really a statement of your self worth. Join Kino on the mat and say: I am worth it! I am worth these few moments of precious practice.

programme.title: Kino in San Francisco
programme.desc: In the latest episode of Global Yogi, Kino climbs the hills of San Fran! Join her as she explores this great town, one of the oldest cities on the United States west coast. Tag along as we venture through the famous micro climates of the city. Cross the Golden Gate Bridge, learn about escapes from Alcatraz, see the Gardens of Lombard Street and so much more! After all those handstands and asanas in front of scenic views, we stop for some of local food and to enjoy the local color. Kino's signature sense of humor and storytelling take center stage in this episode, as she delights in sharing San Francisco with you!

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - True wealth story

programme.title: Global Yogi Trailer Bali
programme.desc: Global Yogi Trailer Bali

programme.title: Kino in Bali
programme.desc: Come with Kino as she explores magical Bali in the latest installment of Global Yogi. This place is a mecca for yoga, healing, surfing and is known for its welcoming and peaceful Balinese culture. Here it’s common to discover a feeling of being safe and sound, and that was certainly the case for Kino. Green juice, island sand, coconuts and temples… the intoxicating energy of the island spirit can be found around every corner. Days are easily spent relaxing and and enjoying waves and sunsets. Check in for a massage, roll out your mat for practice, chat with the charming locals and find the perfect spot for a quiet meditation… All this and more as Kino continues to bring her message of insight and transformation to the world.

programme.desc: A practice that builds up to tree pose. Get rooted into the fundamentals of yoga practice including breath and balance.

programme.title: Yoga Is Strength
programme.desc: So much of Kino's personal journey through yoga has been about learning to be strong. That's why shes so excited to share this class that uses plank pose as a bridge to connecting with your own inner reserves. Tune in and learn alignment and articulation in the body that will help you tap into new levels of strength. This sequence will teach you to feel and engage the back body and deep core in ways that support your yoga journey. You’ll finish this practice with a growing sense of stability and strength in both the body and mind.

programme.title: Shoulders
programme.desc: Build power and foundation with Kino as you join her for more Yoga Drills. This is perfect for those who are looking to build strength and learn strength building techniques. It's a great practice for those who are interested in becoming stronger both inside and out. Get ready to sweat and have some fun!

programme.title: Everyday Drill
programme.desc: When it comes to building strength and flexibility for a more well-rounded yoga practice, yoga drills can help you expedite the process! Join Kino for a set of yoga drills that offer a little mix of everything. Stretch out and strengthen the core, legs, arms, shoulders, and everything in between. Just over 20 minutes.

programme.title: Crispy Orange Cauliﬂower “Chicken”
programme.desc: It’s a spin on Orange Chicken – learn how to make this delicious, crispy orange cauliflower with Alexa Soto.

programme.title: Kino in Berlin
programme.desc: Dive into the rich culture, historic wonder and alternative lifestyle of the amazing city of Berlin. If you’ve spent any significant amount of time traveling, you know it can be hard on both your mind and your body. In this episode, you’ll get an inside look at Kino’s morning ritual, which she insists is part of what keeps her grounded amidst all the traveling. Follow Kino around the beautiful city as she teaches to a group of dedicated yogis and gives you an inside look at the city’s tourist sights through the eyes of yoga. Brush up on your Berlin Art and History knowledge as Kino visits the famous TV Tower, The Berlin Wall, one of the city’s last remaining Occupy Buildings, the Berlin Eastside Galleries and more. This episode is just over 20 minutes long.

programme.title: Global Yogi Trailer Budapest
programme.desc: Global Yogi Trailer Budapest

programme.title: Kino in Budapest
programme.desc: One of Kino’s favorite hobbies is learning how to say ‘Thank You’ in different languages. In this episode of Global Yoga, she's learning that special phrase in Hungarian, as she travels to Budapest. Travel to St Stephen's cathedral, one of the biggest structures in the country, stroll the Danube River and visit Heroes Square, a World Heritage Site. Join Kino as she explores the rich history of this ancient country while on her journey of sharing yoga with the world.

programme.title: Side Plank
programme.desc: Begin this gentle flow with a few moments of mindfulness, then explore the basics of yoga as we build up to a supported practice of side plank

programme.title: Breathwork
programme.desc: Use this practice to work with improving your 3-dimensional breathing.

programme.title: Breathe - Freedom
programme.desc: In the 40-minute practice, Kino leads you through a journey with the breath. Move into the inner space of the body by reconnecting with the power and the vehicle of the breath. Discover the child-like innocence of your body as you engage in this breath focused practice with awareness and intention.

programme.title: Alfredo Mushroom Pasta

programme.title: Bridge
programme.desc: This practice takes you on a journey through the fundamentals of yoga and culminates in a gentle backbend, the bridge pose

programme.title: Meditation Now - The Breath
programme.desc: Join Kino for a gentle meditation on the beach by the beautiful shores of Tulum, Mexico. Let go of your thoughts, and experiences as you use the breath to anchor you to the present moment.

programme.title: Meditation Now - The Body
programme.desc: This is a seaside meditation on the peaceful shores of Tulum, Mexico, guided by Kino MacGregor. Bring your awareness to the gift of your body and move deeply into the inner space of this sacred vessel that carries you through this life.

programme.title: Yoga Is Strength
programme.desc: So much of Kino's personal journey through yoga has been about learning to be strong. That's why shes so excited to share this class that uses plank pose as a bridge to connecting with your own inner reserves. Tune in and learn alignment and articulation in the body that will help you tap into new levels of strength. This sequence will teach you to feel and engage the back body and deep core in ways that support your yoga journey. You’ll finish this practice with a growing sense of stability and strength in both the body and mind.

programme.title: Bakasana
programme.desc: A gentle flow that incorporates the fundamentals of yoga and builds up to the arm balance Bakasana, the crane pose.

programme.title: Natural Beauty
programme.desc: Ready to take your veganism to the next level? This episode of Kino’s Closet is all about Makeup! Tune in as Kino tries a new brand of vegan makeup with help from her makeup artist, Nanda Quero. In this episode, you’ll find out, not only why it’s important to choose ethically sourced brands, but also whether or not Kino gives this brand a thumbs up.

programme.title: Key West Florida- Beyond Your Backyard
programme.desc: "Fun in the Sun" is given a whole new meaning in this episode as Erik The Travel Guy takes you down to Mile Zero to set sail and get some step by step snorkel instruction. He catches the island vibe on Duval Street, learns how to play a conch shell and shows you how to make an authentic Key Lime Pie with a local celebrity, Kermit.

programme.title: LIVINGSTON TAYLOR AND THE BBC CONCERT ORCHESTRA!
programme.desc: LIVINGSTON TAYLOR AND THE BBC CONCERT ORCHESTRA!

programme.title: Bar Harbor Maine- A coastal Gem
programme.desc: Bar Harbor is tough to get to from Boston but it is worth the drive up the coast. Once there you will be enveloped in what a New England sea side fishing community used to be. With the proximity so close to Canada, the types of people walking the streets will delight you to no end. Watch as the boats leave for their long days of fishing, lobstering or taking tourists out for a day of sightseeing.

programme.title: Life is Great New England- Sports & Food from 42 Degrees North of Plymouth- Full Episode
programme.desc: What a great time the Life is Great New England team had at 42 Degrees North in Manomet with owner Erik Hynes, while we talked sports and all things awesome! Alice Cook spent some time with New England Patriots Legend Steve Grogan, and Jon Meterparel met up with the next football up and coming star Troy Flutie. Lastly, Chuck Nilosek got to live out a life long dream of playing at Fenway Park for Fantasy Day sponsored by the Jimmy Fund and the Dana Farber Cancer Institute.

programme.title: Colonial Williamsburg - Beyond Your Backyard
programme.desc: Beyond Your Backyard goes back in time and learns about American life in Colonial Williamsburg. Erik The Travel Guy steps into the shoes of an early American settler in this historic triangle where he takes up arms and learns all about the proper way to fire a musket, ax-throwing, the honest slave story, and how to make delicious ginger biscuits.

programme.title: Go behind the scenes with the Boston Celtics- Life is Great New England
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes with the Boston Celtics- Life is Great New England

programme.title: Mackinac Island MI- Beyond Your Backyard
programme.desc: Time to grab the oat bag and saddle up, folks! Erik and the Crew are hopping on a ferry and heading to a place where horses replace automobiles, and time truly slows down. They’ll explore the island’s breathtaking natural beauty, visit the famous Grand Hotel, fish in Lake Huron, stroll downtown enjoying great food and live music and even attempt a little fudge making.

programme.title: Marshfield Green Harbor-Above Massachusetts
programme.desc: Marshfield Green Harbor-Above Massachusetts

programme.title: Montgomery County, Virginia- Beyond Your Backyard
programme.desc: In this edition of Beyond Your Backyard, Erik travels to Montgomery County, Virginia to uncover the secrets to the preparation of an excellent buffalo burger. He also learns more about the groundbreaking technology research going on Virginia Tech including self-driving vehicles. And finally, Erik explores the county indoors and out!

programme.title: Hingham after Snow Storm- Above New England
programme.desc: Hingham is a beautiful community south of Boston that offers many things to many people. However, on this particular day, PRTV decided to show you this town from a whole new vantage point. The beauty is enhanced by a thick layer of mother natures frosting, thanks to a brutal blizzard from the days before.

programme.title: Buzzards Bay/Buttermilk Bay- Above Massachusetts
programme.desc: Buzzards Bay is home to the amazing Mass Maritime Academy and is considered part of the Gateway to Cape Cod, along with Wareham. Nestled at the west end of the Cape Cod Canal and home to the world famous Cape Cod Canal Rail Road Draw Bridge, Buzzards Bay is a busy summer destination for folks looking for that special New England Sea Side experience. When there, you will be able to enjoy so many seafood restaurants, ice cream stands and even get to visit the National Marine Life Center right near the train bridge. Life is Great New England has a full episode dedicated to this section of the state and is worth checking out! Don't forget to check out the world famous Buzzards Bay Oyster Festival that takes place each May right beneath the rail road bridge by the canal. This video also flys over Buttermilk Bay, which is a neighborhood and section of Bourne, Buzzards Bay, Plymouth and Wareham that shares this distinction.

programme.title: Forefathers Monument- Above New England
programme.desc: Standing high above the town of Plymouth, 81 foot tall Forefathers Monument represents the most important ideals of the new nation forming hundreds of years ago. Morality, Law, Education, and Liberty are values expressed by this monument along with faith, justice, freedom and more. This flight is a patriotic journey that will leave you with goosebumps and pride. A visit to Plymouth MA is not complete without a visit to this wonderful park. The Forefathers Monument is considered the world's largest solid granite monument and can be seen for miles around when in America's Hometown. Shot by Chuck Nilosek of New England Drone.

programme.title: Life is Great New England- Sports & Food from 42 Degrees North of Plymouth- Full Episode
programme.desc: What a great time the Life is Great New England team had at 42 Degrees North in Manomet with owner Erik Hynes, while we talked sports and all things awesome! Alice Cook spent some time with New England Patriots Legend Steve Grogan, and Jon Meterparel met up with the next football up and coming star Troy Flutie. Lastly, Chuck Nilosek got to live out a life long dream of playing at Fenway Park for Fantasy Day sponsored by the Jimmy Fund and the Dana Farber Cancer Institute.
